metas.name: Peep Show - S1E4 - Mark Makes A Friend
metas.description: Mark attends a work conference and in the process makes a new friend, Alan Johnson, which upsets the 'El Dude' partnership. This forces Jeremy to consider who could replace Mark as flatmate and best friend. Super-Hands is the potential replacement, but he doesn't match up as well. Mark grows a moustache, like his new hero, Johnson whilst Jeremy is haunted by flashbacks to 'the one bad thing' that happened when he was wrecked with Super-Hands.

metas.name: Peep Show - S1E5 - Dream Job
metas.description: Jeremy tries to wow Toni with his new job in a music studio while Mark gets passed over for promotion in favour of Sophie, and goes slowly round the twist. They then attempt to solve each other's problems with the help of phone stalking and pepper spray.

metas.name: Peep Show - S1E6 - Funeral
metas.description: In the last episode of the series, death and terminal illness prove to be the keys to romantic success for Mark and Jeremy. Jeremy gets in with the Christians and Mark finds the perfect venue for a first date with Sophie - a funeral. Everyone's having a great time until the paramedics arrive.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E1 - Dance Class
metas.description: Can you love two people at the same time? Jeremy believes you can, and his gorgeous new American girlfriend puts his taboo bashing beliefs to the test. Mark believes you can only love one person. Besides, he and Sophie, the object of his unrequited love, are getting on really well, especially since he starting hacking into her emails.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E2 - Jeremy Makes It
metas.description: Jeremy is hired by an old school friend to make a soundtrack for a film he's making. Mark makes a new friend at work who turns out to hold a fair amount of prejudice. Meanwhile, Sophie spends time with Jeff.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E3 - Local Zero
metas.description: Jeremy wants to get closer to Nancy so he tries to impress her by joining in her volunteer work which involves working in a soup kitchen for the homeless.  Mark manages to get Johnson to think he is an alcoholic.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E4 - University Challenge
metas.description: Mark, determined to forget Sophie, makes an effort to go out with April - but manages to blur the line between enthusiastic new boyfriend and stalker. Jeremy joins a new band, Executioners Bong, but insists that he is neither a roadie nor the equivalent of Bez.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E5 - The Man Show
metas.description: Mark becomes depressed about Sophie living with Jeff, but Jeremy is not sure that self-mutilation is the answer. Besides, Jeremy and Jeff are getting on horribly well.

metas.name: Peep Show - S2E6 - Wedding
metas.description: Jeremy and Nancy are getting married, for visa reasons. Mark, determined to save his friend, will do whatever it takes to stop them...

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E1 - Mugging
metas.description: Mark has a run-in with some muggers, who steal his precious blackberry - and put him off his stroke with Sophie as a result... Meanwhile, Jeremy faces a tricky dilemma over the love of his life and a potential threesome.

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E2 - Sectioning
metas.description: Mark and Sophie are finally beginning to go steady when Sophie is moved away from London for work. Mark is devastated, so Sophie offers phone sex as a solution, which Mark nervously accepts. Meanwhile, Jeremy is forced to consider getting an old friend sectioned.

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E3 - Shrooming
metas.description: Jeremy plans to throw a secret magic mushroom party in the flat, where he hopes to seduce his ex, Big Suze. But when Mark suddenly comes home from work with gastric flu, Jeremy's plans go to pieces.

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E4 - Sistering
metas.description: Mark's plans for an enjoyable and productive week off work go out the window when his sister comes to stay. Jeremy clearly has the hots for her, and when Mark warns him to back off, Jeremy just wants her more...

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E5 - Jurying
metas.description: Jeremy gets called for jury service but soon complicates things by falling for the defendant. Elsewhere, Mark & Sophie go clubbing.

metas.name: Peep Show - S3E6 - Quantocking
metas.description: Mark worries he and Sophie are drifting apart and proposes. Elsewhere Super-Hans decides to give up drugs, and Jeremy once again gets intimate with past love Big Suze.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E1 - Sophie's Parents
metas.description: Mark continues to dread the impending doom of his wedding day, still questioning his actions from the previous season. Both Mark and Jeremy meet Sophie's parents and brother- leading to disaster with arson, sex with a parent and drunken arguments.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E2 - Conference
metas.description: Johnson returns, immediately taking a shine to Big Suze, proposing a deal involving her to Jeremy. Mark is caught up in Johnson's "Project Zeus" with his reputation at the workplace hanging in the balance. Geoff makes his first appearance of the season, and Sophie spends some alone time with Jeremy in the hotel room.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E3 - Gym
metas.description: In order to avoid spending time with Sophie, Mark gets a gym membership. Whilst there he discovers that Jeremy's ex-wife Nancy is working there. Mark tells Jeremy who then becomes desperate to get back together with her. He decides to take a job as a cleaner at the gym and sets about stopping her from dating Mark's personal trainer Matt.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E4 - Handyman
metas.description: Jeremy meets his hero, techno musician Russell "The Orgazoid". He ends up working as his handyman, which leads Mark to become suspicious, as it seems that Jeremy's job consists of making smoothies for him. Meanwhile Mark meets Sally at his school reunion, one the few girls who actually ever liked him. It turns out that she has married one of Mark's childhood tormentors, Foz. Mark decides to try and seduce Sally whilst Sophie is away on a business trip.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E5 - Holiday
metas.description: Jeremy takes Mark on a stag weekend, with a rented canal boat. There, they meet two sisters, Aurora and Lucy, and their father. Jeremy falls in love with Aurora, whilst Lucy becomes sexually attracted to Mark. The father offers Mark a job in India, a way out of his impending marriage to Sophie, whilst Jeremy accidentally kills, and then eats a bit of Aurora's dog.

metas.name: Peep Show - S4E6 - Wedding
metas.description: It's Mark's wedding day. He is torn about whether he should go through with it or not. Jeremy discourages him but Mark continues. On the way to the reception, Sophie breaks down and runs away. Jeremy comforts Mark as the 'El Dude Brothers' are reunited.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E1 - Burgling
metas.description: It's not so long since Mark's new bride Sophie stumbled from the car, looking in appalled fascination at her husband of ten minutes and sobbed, "He's horrible!" As we return for the fifth series of this engagingly filthy comedy, Mark (David Mitchell) is getting drunk and maudlin on wedding champagne as his flatmate Jeremy (Robert Webb) urges him to go out on a double-date: "Beggars can't be choosers, she's an actual woman." Mark - remember, this is a man who once based his romantic strategy on the Siege of Stalingrad - arms himself with a copy of the Friends of the British Museum magazine and goes forth again to search for love.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E2 - Spin War
metas.description: Mark and Sophie return to work, while Jeremy renews his acquaintance with the depraved Super Hans, in yet another filthy, funny episode.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E3 - Jeremy's Broke
metas.description: Jeremy finally runs out of money and finds himself on a downward spiral of hunger, homelessness and criminality. Meanwhile Mark needs to find a girlfriend before his birthday party.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E4 - Jeremy's Mummy
metas.description: Jeremy's tortured relationship with his very sweet mother comes under the spotlight. It emerges that Jez has been living off handouts from his mum for years and now he's in line for half of her £40,000 bequest from an aunt. Jeremy's need to self destruct kicks in immediately, as does Mark's inability to stop his excruciating attempts to ingratiate himself with any mature grown-up. He adores Jeremy's mum and hero-worships her Scots Guardsman boyfriend.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E5 - Jeremy's Manager
metas.description: Jeremy and Super Hans get a band manager and play a Christian rock festival. Mark comes along as their roadie, and learns how to have sex properly for the first time in his life.

metas.name: Peep Show - S5E6 - Mark's Women
metas.description: Mark gets into online gaming and live role play with Dobby and wonders whether she may be The One. Meanwhile, Mark and Sophie finally sort out their annulment. Jeremy joins a cult.

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E1 - Jeremy at JLB
metas.description: Newly promoted Mark decides to enjoy his additional power and wealth by splashing out on a boiler, a 'creamy elephant' sofa and by finding Jeremy a job in the office. Things are also looking promising for Mark in his pursuit of Dobby, the company IT girl. However, a routine fire drill puts his plans into total disarray.

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E2 - The Test
metas.description: Mark makes a final play for Dobby, the object of his desires. Meanwhile, Jeremy meets a new love, Russian émigré Elena. Both guys are determined to impress, but one of them is an expectant father. And when the pregnant Sophie spills the beans, both Mark and Jeremy's worlds change forever.

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E3 - Jeremy in Love
metas.description: Jeremy realises that he's in love with Elena and decides to be generally less selfish to win her affection. He also thinks it might be a good idea to tell her he loves her, but Mark isn't so sure...

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E4 - The Affair
metas.description: Mark discovers that Jeremy's girlfriend Elena has a guilty secret. But should he tell him when Jez is clearly so happy? In addition to this, Alan Johnson offers Mark the chance to go into business with him. Mark, while reassuring himself that this is his dream offer, begins to see Johnson in a new light. Big Suze inadvertently brings Mark and Jeremy's problems to a head

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E5 - The Party
metas.description: As a last desperate hurrah before the baby arrives, Mark and Jeremy decide to throw a party. Mark sees it as his final opportunity to reignite his relationship with Dobby, while Jeremy imagines it's a chance to make Elena insanely jealous. But as the evening proceeds, it all becomes a bit of an emotional roller-coaster.

metas.name: Peep Show - S6E6 - Das Boot
metas.description: Time is running out for Jeremy as Elena and Gail's marriage is imminent. However, he thinks there may be a way to get Gail off the scene and win Elena back. Meanwhile Mark, although conflicted about becoming a father, is worried that Jeff is becoming a potential rival dad. He decides that he's going to learn to drive so that he can take Sophie to the hospital when the baby arrives. Sophie is delighted, but learning to drive doesn't prove that easy.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E1 - St Hospital's
metas.description: Mark and Jeremy are at the hospital awaiting the birth of Mark's baby. Sophie is determined to have a natural birth and doesn't want Mark to transfer any of his anxiety to the baby. Meanwhile, Jeremy is convinced he will never get over losing Elena, until he meets Zahra, whose boyfriend is in a coma.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E2 - Man Jam
metas.description: Dobby, the object of Mark's desires, is now dating a graphic designer named Simon. Both Gerrard and Mark are determined to win her affections. Ben offers Jeremy the ideal job as head of development for his music web site.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E3 - A Beautiful Mind
metas.description: Jeremy holds a book group at the flat in an effort to try and impress Zahra but apart from Mr Nice, Jeremy has never read a book. Mark is concerned by not being able to satisfy Dobby's sexual needs and decides to get some help for the problem.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E4 - Nether Zone
metas.description: Mark's baby's christening day arrives and he arranges to take Jeremy to the church with him. The duo end up getting locked in the hallway of Zahra's flat though.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E5 - Seasonal Beatings
metas.description: Mark has invited his parents over for Christmas dinner. Everything has been planned down to the last detail but Jeremy has become over excited and Dobby and Super Hans show up as unexpected guests.

metas.name: Peep Show - S7E6 - New Year's Eve
metas.description: Mark is depressed about Dobby on New Year's Eve but Jeremy is determined that the 'El Dude Brothers' are going to have the best night ever.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E1 - Jeremy Therapised
metas.description: Mark has asked Dobby to move in with him, and Jeremy is faced with the prospect of moving out to make way. But Jeremy has been dragging his heels and Mark is increasingly worried that Dobby will move in with his rival, Gerrard instead.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E2 - Business Secrets of the Pharaohs
metas.description: Mark gets a lucky break when his book, 'Business Secrets of the Pharaohs', is accepted by a 'publisher'. Jeremy, in an attempt to kick-start his career, enrols on a life-coaching course.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E3 - The Love Bunker
metas.description: Simon, Dobby's ex-boyfriend, invites Mark, Dobby, Jeremy and Superhans to join him and his friends for a paintballing weekend. Mark is convinced that Simon is using the weekend as a cover to get back with Dobby, and Jeremy is convinced he can life coach Neil, Simon's best friend.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E4 - Big Mad Andy
metas.description: Jeremy finally agrees to leave the flat and move in with Super Hans. Mark employs a decorator, Andy, to repaint the kitchen, and Jeremy helps out by giving him free 'life-coaching' advice. Meanwhile, Mark enrolls on a business studies evening course and meets Stephanie an attractive older woman.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E5 - Chairman Mark
metas.description: Jeremy, desperate to avoid living with Superhans, sparks up an old relationship with Mark's siser Sara, and moves in with her and her five-year-old son, Joshy. Mark, meanwhile, in an attempt to deal with a damp patch on his bedroom wall, launches a campaign to be elected chairman of the freehold committee of Apollo House.

metas.name: Peep Show - S8E6 - Quantocking II
metas.description: Dobby is offered a job in New York by ex-boyfriend Simon. Uncertain about the offer, Dobby suggests that she and Mark spend a weekend in the country. The perfect time, as far as Jeremy is concerned, to get a few things off his chest.

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E1 - The William Morris Years
metas.description: Time has not healed the rift between former friends Mark and Jeremy. When Jeremy has to ask for a loan, Mark sees his chance for revenge...

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E2 - Gregory's Beard
metas.description: Mark and Jeremy are reunited in the flat, Super Hans prepares for his wedding day, putting Mark under pressure as his best man. But there's a perk - Dobby will be there.

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E3 - Threeism
metas.description: Jeremy's love life takes a surprising turn, as Mark is dealing with his own matters of the heart.

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E4 - Mole-Mapping
metas.description: Mark's determination to get the woman of his dreams isn't hindered by the fact that she has a husband. Jeremy on the other hand is getting a tough dose of reality from a client.

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E5 - Kid Farm
metas.description: Jeremy and Hans publish their first track on a football video on YouTube, but they disagree of the authorship of the lyrics. Mark takes his kid Ian for playtime in the Kid Kave, and tries to balance between miserable stability with Sophie, or a potential relationship with April.

metas.name: Peep Show - S9E6 - Are We Going to Be Alright?
metas.description: It's the last ever Peep Show from the El Dude Brothers. Jeremy is turning 40 - and it's hitting him hard - while Mark makes an audacious attempt to win the woman of his dreams.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E1 - Human Flesh
metas.description: A health inspector's visit coincides with Bob's efforts to bring in customers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E2 - Crawl Space
metas.description: A leaky roof causes Bob to get trapped in a wall while Linda's mother visits.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E3 - Sacred Cow
metas.description: Bob takes to a film maker's cow.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E4 - Sexy Dance Fighting
metas.description: Tina develops a crush on her martial arts instructor.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E5 - Hamburger Dinner Theater
metas.description: Linda and the kids stage a murder mystery that doesn't go as planned.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E6 - Sheesh! Cab, Bob?
metas.description: Tina is desperate to get her first kiss at her 13th birthday party. But after Louise breaks the deep fryer, Bob takes a second job as a late-night cab driver to pay for Tina’s party. Things keep getting worse for Bob when the parents of Tina’s crush refuse to let their son attend the party, and Bob has to do everything in his power to save his daughter’s big day.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E7 - Bed & Breakfast
metas.description: Linda hosts a bed and breakfast, but her guests aren't as grateful as she would like.  Things take a turn for the worse when Louise's room is rented to Teddy.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E8 - Art Crawl
metas.description: It's Bob vs. the city art council when Linda's sister displays her work at Bob's Burgers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E9 - Spaghetti Western and Meatballs
metas.description: Bob and Gene bond over spaghetti western movies, which makes Louise jealous.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E10 - Burger Wars
metas.description: When Bob's eccentric landlord, Mr. Fischoeder, pays the family a visit, he informs Bob that his rival across the street, Jimmy Pesto of Jimmy Pesto's Pizzeria, wants to take over Bob's lease so that he can expand his gift shop. With little time and not enough money, the Belcher family must cook up some business or luck to save the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E11 - Weekend at Mort's
metas.description: Bob and his family are forced to spend the weekend at Mort the Mortician's while the restaurant is being de-molded. Linda and Bob double date with Mort and a female mortician he meets online while Tina babysits Gene and Louise in Mort’s crematorium.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E12 - Lobsterfest
metas.description: After the town's annual Lobsterfest is cancelled by a storm, Bob defiantly opens his doors for a festive celebration. When he wakes the next morning, Bob finds the restaurant in disarray and that the town has spurned him, but Bob won't let that deter him from further involvement in the celebratory weekend.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S1E13 - Torpedo
metas.description: Bob's hero, a washed-up baseball player named Torpedo Jones, starts pitching for the local minor league team. Torpedo befriends Bob, but the dark underbelly of minor league baseball threatens to corrupt the Belchers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E1 - The Belchies
metas.description: The kids hunt for treasure in an abandoned taffy factory and Bob and Linda must find them before the factory’s scheduled demolition

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E2 - Bob Day Afternoon
metas.description: A bank robber holds up a bank across the street from Bob’s Burgers. When the robbery goes awry, Bob finds himself at the center of a hostage crisis.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E3 - Synchronized Swimming
metas.description: The kids con their way out of gym class with a bogus synchronized swimming independent study. Meanwhile, Bob welcomes a new soft serve ice cream machine to the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E4 - Burgerboss
metas.description: Bob becomes obsessed with an old-school burger-flipping video game after Jimmy Pesto gets the high score and writes "BOB SUX" on the leader board.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E5 - Food Truckin'
metas.description: The Belchers beg Bob to buy a food truck to compete against the ones that are stealing his customers. When the "Lolla-Pa-Foods-A-Festival" comes up, the Belchers bring the truck and the kids decide to cause mischief. Unfortunately, this causes a riot to rise from the other food truckers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E6 - Dr. Yap
metas.description: While Bob is medicated, he mistakes Linda's sister, Gayle, for his wife and kisses her. After she falls for him, Bob seeks help from Dr. Yap.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E7 - Moody Foodie
metas.description: The restaurant receives a negative review from a vicious food critic.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E8 - Bad Tina
metas.description: Tina befriends a bad girl in a bid to get closer to Jimmy Junior.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S2E9 - Beefsquatch
metas.description: Bob appears in a cooking segment on a local news morning program, but Gene steals the show when he crashes the set with a sasquatch mask.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E1 - Ear-sy Rider
metas.description: A biker gang sets up shop in the restaurant, where they lament the loss of their beloved leader.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E2 - Full Bars
metas.description: The Belcher kids break with a long standing Halloween tradition, veering away from their usual trick or treat trek in favor of a posh neighborhood that's known for its oversize goodies.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E3 - Bob Fires the Kids
metas.description: Worried that his kids are not enjoying summer vacation because he's making them work in the restaurant, Bob fires them. But they soon become bored and take jobs as "weed pickers" for a pair of hippie farmers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E4 - Mutiny on the Windbreaker
metas.description: Bob does a tour of duty as a private chef on a docked cruise ship and brings along the family to witness his true culinary skills, but the special occasion is scuttled when the kooky captain shanghais the whole family.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E5 - An Indecent Thanksgiving Proposal
metas.description: Bob's plans for his favorite holiday, Thanksgiving, change when Mr. Fischoeder hires him as a chef, and Linda and the kids to play his family, as he tries to stage a perfect holiday dinner in order to make a former flame jealous.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E6 - The Deepening
metas.description: Mr. Fischoeder's new pier attraction, a mechanical shark, goes haywire and terrorizes the town, and it falls to Bob and the family to catch it.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E7 - Tina-rannosaurus Wrecks
metas.description: After Tina accidentally wrecks the car, and gets the whole family involved with a slimy insurance agent, she worries that she's a "jinx".

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E8 - The Unbearable Like-Likeness of Gene
metas.description: Gene gets his first girlfriend, but it doesn't take long for the family to realize that she is incredibly annoying and they pressure him to break up with her.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E9 - Bob Rest Ye Merry Gentle-Mannequins
metas.description: When Bob inherits a storage unit around Christmas, visions of riches dance in the heads of the family, but what they find inside is a squatter who claims he once worked as a mannequin.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E10 - Mother Daughter Laser Razor
metas.description: Linda worries that her relationship with Louise isn't as good as it should be, so, much to Louise's chagrin, she forces the young lady to participate in a mother-daughter seminar. With mom away, Tina turns to Bob for a lesson in shaving her legs.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E11 - Nude Beach
metas.description: The new health inspector proves to be a decent fellow, until he blackmails Bob into being allowed to perform his atrocious music at the restaurant, which drives away the customers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E12 - Broadcast Wagstaff School News
metas.description: There is a "Mad Pooper" running wild at the Belcher children's middle school and Tina finds herself on a mission to get to the "bottom" of the situation.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E13 - My Fuzzy Valentine
metas.description: When a heart-shaped pancake simply doesn't cut it, the kids convince Bob to let them skip school in order to help him find a Valentine's Day gift that will "wow" Linda. Meanwhile, in the spirit of the romantic holiday, Linda sets up a speed-dating event at the restaurant that doesn't go exactly as planned.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E14 - Lindapendent Woman
metas.description: Linda thinks Bob doesn't appreciate her and quits the restaurant to work at a grocery store. In her absence, Bob tries - and fails - to run the place on his own and the kids are stuck in the middle of the marital mayhem. Meanwhile, things get romantic for Tina when she meets her potential soul mate while restocking the milk fridge.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E15 - O.T.: The Outside Toilet
metas.description: When Gene finds an expensive talking toilet out in the woods, he and his friends decide to protect it as much as they can while an evil toilet hunter is looking for the toilet.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E16 - Topsy
metas.description: Louise expects to get a charge out of taking down her Thomas Edison-obsessed science teacher when she re-creates one of the famous inventor's experiments that involved electrocuting an elephant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E17 - Two for Tina
metas.description: Jimmy Jr. is threatened when Tina starts dating a ballet dancer named Josh and the two boys get into an epic dance-off for her heart

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E18 - It Snakes a Village
metas.description: The Belcher family road-trips down to Florida to visit Linda's parents who live in a senior home that - to Linda's complete horror - is full of senior swingers! Plus, to keep themselves entertained, Tina, Gene and Louise go on a hunt for a mysterious python that allegedly ate one of the residents' dogs.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E19 - Family Fracas
metas.description: After the family car breaks down and ruins their plans for a movie night out, the Belchers find themselves competing on the TV game show "Family Fracas!" To the dismay of the program's host, they keep winning and coming back each night...that is until their lucky streak comes to a suspicious end.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E20 - The Kids Run the Restaurant
metas.description: After Bob cuts his finger and faints at the sight of his own blood, Linda brings him to the hospital and leaves the kids home alone. Not ones to waste a golden opportunity, Tina, Gene and Louise transform the basement of the restaurant into a makeshift casino. But they get more than they gamble for when landlord Mr. Fischoeder stops by and catches them in action.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E21 - Boyz 4 Now
metas.description: While accompanying Tina to a "Boyz 4 Now" concert, Louise develops a crush on one of the lead singers, Boo Boo - and is in disbelief that she actually likes a boy! Meanwhile, Gene gets creative - and slightly offensive - in a table-setting competition.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E22 - Carpe Museum
metas.description: Bob chaperones a school trip to the museum and experiences some father-daughter bonding with Louise, while Gene and his gang are on the lookout for exhibits with busts, and not the kind that are sculpted out of stone. Later, on the museum steps, Linda offers her distinctive chanting talents to striking workers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S3E23 - The Unnatural
metas.description: After Gene loses his confidence at his baseball game, Linda decides to sign him up for baseball camp. The only problem? She needs money to pay for it! Meanwhile, Tina discovers her love for espresso and becomes a caffeine addict.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E1 - A River Runs Through Bob
metas.description: Bob, Linda and the kids brave river rapids, squirrels and separation while on a camping adventure.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E2 - Fort Night
metas.description: The kids' Halloween adventure goes awry when Louise's friend Millie takes them hostage.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E3 - Seaplane!
metas.description: Linda's attempt to spice up date night by signing up for flying lessons backfires when Bob refuses to go with her and she ends up the target of a charming pilot.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E4 - My Big Fat Greek Bob
metas.description: When Bob gets a job cooking at a frat house, he and the brothers find themselves in the middle of a prank war; the kids hatch a plan to invade the frat house.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E5 - Turkey in a Can
metas.description: Bob discovers his carefully prepared turkey was put in the toilet in an act of Thanksgiving sabotage.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E6 - Purple Rain-Union
metas.description: Linda reunites her old band to perform at her high school reunion; a woman who had a crush on Bob in high school attempts to impress him.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E7 - Bob and Deliver
metas.description: Bob becomes a substitute home economics teacher at Tina's school and creates a restaurant in the classroom.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E8 - Christmas in the Car
metas.description: The Belchers spend Christmas Eve running from a candy cane-shaped truck; Teddy gets stuck in the Santa trap.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E9 - Slumber Party
metas.description: Linda plans a surprise slumber party for Louise, much to her dismay; Louise tries to make the girls go home; Linda becomes infatuated some raccoons that are getting into the restaurant's dumpster.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E10 - Presto Tina-O
metas.description: In order to get closer to Jimmy Jr., Tina becomes a magician's assistant; Bob becomes the victim of a curse.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E11 - Easy Com-mercial, Easy Go-mercial
metas.description: The Belchers hire a documentary filmmaker and a former football star to help them film a commercial.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E12 - The Frond Files
metas.description: Bob and Linda learn that their kids' essays about their fantasy versions of the school are considered offensive and too creative.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E13 - Mazel-Tina
metas.description: Tina isn't invited to a classmate's bat mitzvah but ends up at the event anyway when her family is hired to cater.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E14 - Uncle Teddy
metas.description: When Bob and Linda plan a romantic getaway at a burger convention, they ask Teddy to watch the kids; Teddy tries to put Tina's crush in his place.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E15 - The Kids Rob a Train
metas.description: When the Belchers go on a train trip, Gene, Louise and Tina are seated in a separate car; Linda and Bob indulge in a wine-tasting.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E16 - I Get a Psy-Chic Out of You
metas.description: After predicting a telemarketer's call at the restaurant, Linda and the kids believe she's psychic.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E17 - The Equestranauts
metas.description: Tina attends a convention based on an animated show about ponies and finds that many of the fans are middle-aged men; when Tina is tricked out of her rare pony toy, Bob goes under cover to get it back.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E18 - Ambergris
metas.description: When Gene, Louise and Tina discover a valuable whale by-product on the beach, Louise tries to cheat her siblings out of the profit; Bob and Linda deal with their unstable landlord.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E19 - The Kids Run Away
metas.description: When she learns she has a cavity, Louise runs away from the dentist's office and seeks refuge at Aunt Gail's house.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E20 - Gene It On
metas.description: When Tina is unable to speak after falling and biting her tongue during a cheerleading audition, Louise offers to be her translator.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E21 - Wharf Horse (or How Bob Saves/Destroys The Town) (1)
metas.description: Motivated by the promise of a beachside burger restaurant, Bob helps Felix talk Mr. Fischoeder into selling Wonder Wharf.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S4E22 - World Wharf II: The Wharfening (or How Bob Saves/Destroys The Town) (2)
metas.description: Linda and the kids must save the day when Felix's desperate measures put Bob and Mr. Fischoeder in danger.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E1 - Work Hard or Die Trying, Girl
metas.description: Gene tries to make one of his dreams a reality when he gets the opportunity to make a musical version of Die Hard at the Wagstaff Fall Festival.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E2 - Tina and the Real Ghost
metas.description: Tina begins an out-of-this-world romance with a ghost that is believed to be living in the Belcher's basement.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E3 - Friends with Burger-fits
metas.description: Teddy's health is a cause for concern. So he and Bob attend a bootcamp. The kids come up with a new sport to play in the walk-in refrigerator.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E4 - Dawn of the Peck
metas.description: While Bob is boycotting the holiday, Linda and the kids spend Thanksgiving at the First Annual Fischoeder Turk-tacular Turkey Town Festival. However, a wild bird attack leads to total mayhem.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E5 - Best Burger
metas.description: Bob enters a burger-making contest, only to discover that his distinguishing ingredient is missing! To help out their dad, the kids go on a mission to find the ever-so-important black garlic.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E6 - Father of the Bob
metas.description: Bob and his dad, "Big Bob", try to outdo each other in the kitchen when they rehash an old argument at Big Bob's Christmas party. Meanwhile, the kids compete to get the best present for Bob.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E7 - Tina Tailor Soldier Spy
metas.description: Tina goes undercover in her old Thundergirls troop to find the mole who is giving away their cookie secrets. Meanwhile, Linda dyes her hair blonde.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E8 - Midday Run
metas.description: Who runs the halls? Tina! When Tina is up for a hall monitor promotion, she's determined to do whatever it takes to nab the powerful job.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E9 - Speakeasy Rider
metas.description: Tina, Gene and Louise are ready to put the pedal to the metal when they join a go-kart league. Meanwhile, back at the restaurant Bob and Teddy partner up to serve Teddy's home-brewed beer on the sly.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E10 - Late Afternoon in the Garden of Bob and Louise
metas.description: Bob agrees to give Logan a job at the restaurant in exchange for a plot at the local community garden.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E11 - Can't Buy Me Math
metas.description: Tina teams up with Darryl to win the Cupid's Couple contest at the school dance. Meanwhile, Linda plans a full week of ambitious Valentine's Day activities for her and Bob.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E12 - The Millie-churian Candidate
metas.description: Tina and Louise volunteer to run Jimmy Junior's class president campaign in order to keep Millie from winning, and ruining the school. Meanwhile, Bob becomes obsessed with a knife after talking himself into buying it for $300.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E13 - The Gayle Tales
metas.description: Gayle arrives at Bob's Burgers in tears because her date for the evening was cancelled and she had theater tickets. Desperate to get out of the house after being grounded, the kids compete to be Aunt Gayle's "date" for the evening via an essay contest.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E14 - L'il Hard Dad
metas.description: Bob becomes obsessed with his new automatic helicopter. When it falls apart for no reason, he enters into a battle with the manufacturer in order to receive a refund. Gene assists Bob in his quest, but things quickly get out of hand and end in a crazy helicopter battle. Meanwhile, Louise and Linda help Tina prepare for her oral book report.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E15 - Adventures in Chinchilla-sitting
metas.description: Bob and Linda head out on the town for a date - but to Linda's dismay, Bob's idea of romance proves "trivial." Meanwhile, a wild chinchilla chase ensues after the school pet that Louise was charged with watching escapes out the front door.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E16 - The Runway Club
metas.description: The kids are sentenced to Saturday detention and will do anything it takes to leave early, so they can attend the Cotton Candy Festival. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda believe they are being scammed by a young girl at the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E17 - Itty Bitty Ditty Committee
metas.description: Gene starts a band with Tina, Louise, Rudy, Peter and Daryl, only to be kicked out and left on his own. After declaring that he will never play his Casio again, Tina and Louise join forces to help Gene rediscover his love of music. Meanwhile, Linda deals with a horrible armpit rash that has everyone disgusted!

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E18 - Eat, Spray, Linda
metas.description: It's Linda's birthday and Bob needs more time to plan her birthday surprise. But when he sends her out of the house as a distraction, she goes missing! Mayhem ensues as the Belchers must work together to find Linda.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E19 - Housetrap
metas.description: In true Belcher fashion, the family gets stuck in a terrible storm while vacationing at a beach house in Craggy Neck. The storm is the least of their worries, however, when they are forced to take shelter with the mysterious owner of the home.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E20 - Hawk & Chick
metas.description: Bob and Louise are thrilled when they meet Hawk, the star of their favorite martial arts series, and are quick to offer help upon learning about his family troubles.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S5E21 - The Oeder Games
metas.description: With the threat of a rent increase on Ocean Avenue, Bob and the other tenants rebel! After approaching Fischoeder, the tenants find out that they will have to compete in order to convince him to keep their rents reasonable.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E1 - Sliding Bobs
metas.description: Bob notices that he has started to lose his hair. In a wave of nostalgia, Linda reminisces about Bob’s mustache and how it made her fall for him years ago. Meanwhile, the kids tell their own versions of the story of how their parents met.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E2 - The Land Ship
metas.description: The upcoming Land Ship parade could mean increased business for Bob, until he learns that two port-o-potties will be placed in front the restaurant. Meanwhile, Tina learns from her friends that she’s boring, so she joins up with Jordan who has been vandalizing the school with graffiti. But when Jordan wants to spray graffiti on the Land Ship, Tina must decide between ruining the parade or disappointing her new crush.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E3 - The Hauntening
metas.description: The Belchers are ready for an amazing Halloween! Louise reveals that she has never been scared before and the family sets out to visit a spooky haunted house. When trouble ensues following their visit, the Belchers find themselves in a zany situation more frightening than they bargained for!

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E4 - Gayle Makin' Bob Sled
metas.description: When Gayle is injured, Linda sends Bob off to pick her up, so that she doesn't miss out on Thanksgiving festivities. But an unexpected snowstorm derails his trip home, and his epic plan to prepare the turkey is foiled. Bob then must put the fate of the turkey and the Belcher Thanksgiving in Linda's hands and spend time bonding with his sister-in-law.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E5 - Nice-Capades
metas.description: When a grumpy mall Santa threatens the kids with the dreaded Naughty List, Gene, Tina and Louise decide to put on a musical performance spectacular to earn their spot on the Nice List. Can they change Santa’s mind in time to save their Christmas?

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E6 - The Cook, the Steve, the Gayle, & Her Lover
metas.description: When Bob throws a dinner party to bond with his new friend, Gayle uses the opportunity to introduce the family to her new love interest. Little does she know, Louise has a long-standing feud with Gayle’s boyfriend and her niece will stop at nothing to break them apart. Calamity ensues as Bob attempts to impress his new buddy and the kids take action.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E7 - The Gene and Courtney Show
metas.description: Gene and Courtney get their big break when they are asked to be the new hosts of the morning announcements, but their romantic history threatens to get in the way. Meanwhile, Tina's attempt to play Cupid goes tragically awry when she volunteers to spear-head the Valentine's Day carnation fundraiser.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E8 - Sexy Dance Healing
metas.description: After Bob slips on the sidewalk, he is forced to take legal action in order to pay for surgery. In a turn of events, Bob finds himself under the care of Jairo, who promises to help him heal without a doctor. Meanwhile, the kids create a fake law firm to settle their personal discrepancies.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E9 - Sacred Couch
metas.description: After a family vote rules against buying a new couch during TV Night, Louise takes matters into her own hands. The Belchers take sides as they are forced to decide whether memories are enough to keep their family sofa. Will they take the Sofa Queen’s advice and learn to love a new couch?

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E10 - Lice Things Are Lice
metas.description: When Tina volunteers alongside Nurse Liz, she finds herself involved in the biggest scandal to hit Wagstaff: a lice infestation. Meanwhile, Bob makes improvements to the restaurant that end up driving customers away. Can the Belchers juggle both a crisis at the restaurant and lice?

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E11 - House of 1000 Bounces
metas.description: When there is a bounce house crisis at Regular Sized Rudy’s birthday party, the Belcher kids devise a scheme to save the day. Meanwhile, Bob deals with an unexpected guest at the restaurant and is forced to come to terms with a longstanding fear.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E12 - Stand By Gene
metas.description: When Gene overhears talk about a mystical creature that lives nearby, he leads the Belcher kids and their friends on a journey to find it. Meanwhile, Linda's competitive nature takes over during downtime at the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E13 - Wag the Hog
metas.description: When Bob's longtime friend, Critter, finds himself in jail for unpaid parking tickets, the Belchers decide to do what they can to help him out. Meanwhile, Linda takes on a babysitting job that becomes more work than she signed up for.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E14 - The Hormone-iums
metas.description: When Dottie Minerva comes down with a bad case of mono, Tina gets her shot as soloist of the Hormone-iums. But as she rehearses for the big assembly, Tina realizes that her role in the play could ruin her social status. Meanwhile, Linda strikes gold with a business plan that she thinks could make the Belchers rich.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E15 - Pro Tiki/Con Tiki
metas.description: When Bob's friend, Warren, comes to town, he makes an offer to invest in the restaurant. Bob is thrilled that it finally could get a much-needed makeover, until he learns that Warren has some strong interior design choices in mind. Meanwhile, Warren's visit means one of the kids must give up their bedroom.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E16 - Bye Bye Boo Boo
metas.description: When Louise hears that Boo Boo is leaving Boyz 4 Now, she enters a contest that could give Tina the chance to meet him. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda learn an interesting piece of history regarding the restaurant, which leads to tension between Bob and Jimmy Pesto.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E17 - The Horse Rider-er
metas.description: After finally convincing Bob and Linda to send her to horse camp, Tina realizes she has to part ways with Jericho, her imaginary horse. Meanwhile, Linda decides to create a restaurant camp in an attempt to make things fair for Gene and Louise.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E18 - Secret Admiral-irer
metas.description: Tina's ideas of love and romance are tested and Bob makes new friends.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S6E19 - Glued, Where's My Bob?
metas.description: Bob gets glued to the toilet in the restaurant as a result of a prank gone wrong by the kids.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E1 - Flu-ouise
metas.description: When the youngest Belcher comes down with an epic case of the flu, Linda has a mishap as she tries to deliver Louise's favorite toy to her daughter's bedside. After Louise vows that she will never forgive her family for their mistake, she falls into a wild fever dream filled with familiar faces, zany musical numbers and a crazy adventure.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E2 - Sea Me Now
metas.description: Teddy tries to impress his ex-wife by organizing a day trip on his newly refurbished boat; Tina attempts to prove she's responsible enough to have a cellphone by taking care of Bob's prized eraser.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E3 - Teen-A-Witch
metas.description: With Halloween quickly approaching, Tina reveals her brilliant idea that will finally win her first place in the annual costume contest. When Tammy steals her idea, Tina is forced to seek the help of Mr. Ambrose, who leads her to alternate and other-worldly methods of winning. Meanwhile, Bob is on a mission to figure out who is stealing his perfectly crafted pumpkins.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E4 - They Serve Horses, Don't They?
metas.description: The Belchers find themselves involved in a full-blown investigation after Bob secures a new meat provider.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E5 - Larger Brother, Where Fart Thou?
metas.description: When Tina has a mishap that lands her in detention, Bob and Linda don't have a babysitter for their other kids, forcing them to let Gene and Louise stay at home alone. With the house to themselves, the younger Belchers find themselves in a sticky situation, while Bob and Linda get into surprising trouble with their accountant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E6 - The Quirk-ducers
metas.description: When Mr. Frond’s annual play threatens to ruin the half day before Thanksgiving, Gene and Louise decide they need to sabotage it in order to save their long weekend. Unknowingly, Tina provides her holiday fan fiction as the subject matter and the kids get to work on their own version of the play. Meanwhile, Linda finds a potato with a striking resemblance to her late grandfather.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E7 - The Last Gingerbread House on the Left
metas.description: As the Belchers prepare for Christmas, Bob gets an unexpected call from Mr. Fischoeder asking him to bring food to a party at his home. When Bob arrives, he discovers that he has gotten involved in an intense gingerbread house building competition with Mr. Fischoeder's rowdy group of friends. Meanwhile, Linda and Teddy try to inspire some Christmas cheer in the neighbors as they take the kids caroling.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E8 - Ex Mach Tina
metas.description: After hurting her ankle, Tina enrolls in a program that enables her send a robot of herself to school and the robot gives her an unexpected breakthrough with Jimmy Jr.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E9 - Bob Actually
metas.description: With Valentine's Day approaching, Tina, Gene and Louise each find themselves wrapped up in love-caused chaos. Meanwhile, Bob decides on a romantic gesture in order to impress Linda.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E10 - There's No Business Like Mr. Business Business
metas.description: When Gayle's cat, Mr. Business, secures pet agent Ian Amberson, Bob finds out that Linda may have been helping to fund the cat's career. Ever the skeptic, Bob is prepared to shut it down, but learns that Mr. Business could be on the verge of his big break.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E11 - A Few 'Gurt Men
metas.description: Louise is put in a sticky situation when she must defend one of her biggest foes at Wagstaff during a mock-trial. Meanwhile, Bob works with Jimmy Pesto to out a regular food-scammer.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E12 - Like Gene for Chocolate
metas.description: When Gene learns that the formula for his favorite chocolate has changed, he works with the head of the company in an attempt to remedy the situation. Meanwhile, Bob gets wrapped up in one of Teddy's less-than-perfect plans.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E13 - The Grand Mama-Pest Hotel
metas.description: Linda jumps at the chance to chaperone Tina's weekend away at a heroine conference, but Tina's new friend could put Linda's perfect weekend in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the younger Belchers have plans for their weekend alone with Bob. What could possibly go wrong?

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E14 - Aquaticism
metas.description: When Tina learns that the aquarium is in danger of closing, the Belcher children devise a scheme to keep it running. Meanwhile, Bob realizes that he could learn a thing or two from Linda's customer service skills.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E15 - Ain't Miss Debatin'
metas.description: When Tina is recruited by the debate team, she finds unexpected success and an even more unexpected relationship. Meanwhile, Louise and Gene convince their parents to help fund a stop-motion movie focusing on a surprising subject matter.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E16 - Eggs for Days
metas.description: The annual Easter egg hunt always brings out the competitive sides of Bob and Linda, but this time, the game goes awry. After the Belcher parents have a little too much fun hiding the eggs, the entire family is enlisted in finding the lone egg that is quickly rotting in its hiding place. Don't miss the calamity that ensues

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E17 - Zero Larp Thirty
metas.description: When Linda wins a contest to spend a dream weekend at the home where her favorite television show is filmed, things don't go quite as planned. Back at home, Teddy's back problems leave him stuck on the floor, while he babysits the kids.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E18 - The Laser-inth
metas.description: Gene accompanies Bob on the last-ever rock-and-roll laser show at the planetarium, but the night takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Linda takes the girls out for dinner and Louise has a surprise revelation.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E19 - Thelma & Louise Except Thelma is Linda
metas.description: After Louise gets in trouble at school, Linda is forced to meet with Mr. Frond and potentially could lose her hard-earned position as the Wagstaff bake sale leader. When she finds out that her daughter was actually trying to help another student, Linda is torn between following school policy or her own moral code.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E20 - Mom, Lies and Videotapes
metas.description: Linda comes down with a nasty cold just in time for the Mother’s Day show at Wagstaff.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E21 - Paraders of the Lost Float
metas.description: Teddy tries to persuade Bob to participate in the float contest for a supposedly easy victory.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S7E22 - Into the Mild
metas.description: When Bob discovers that an outdoor specialty store is going out of business, he tries to live his dream of being an outdoorsman.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E1 - Brunchsquatch
metas.description: To compete with Jimmy Pesto, Bob's Burgers begins serving brunch, but it quickly turns to chaos. Meanwhile, Tina, Gene and Louise decide to help Mr. Fischoeder's brother hide from him.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E2 - The Silence of the Louise
metas.description: When Mr. Frond's therapy dolls are mysteriously attacked, Louise teams up with Millie to help solve the case. Meanwhile, Teddy decides to get into the inspirational poster business, but ends up with mixed results.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E3 - The Wolf of Wharf Street
metas.description: On Halloween night, Linda tries to impress the kids by taking them to look for a wolf that has been terrorizing the town. Meanwhile, an injured and medicated Bob believes that Teddy has turned into a werewolf.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E4 - Sit Me Baby One More Time
metas.description: When Tina launches a babysitting enterprise, it is quickly derailed after her business nemesis, Tammy, is hired to work alongside her. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda check out their competition at a restaurant that’s known for its burgers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E5 - Thanks-hoarding
metas.description: The Belchers reluctantly agree to help Teddy when his family unexpectedly tells him that they will be coming to see him on Thanksgiving.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E6 - The Bleakening (1)
metas.description: Linda hopes to add some extra cheer around the neighborhood by hosting a party at the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E7 - The Bleakening (2)
metas.description: Linda is determined to host a party at the restaurant, in an effort to spread a little extra cheer around the neighborhood. But when she realizes that her prized ornaments have been stolen, she quickly begins questioning all guests, including Marshmallow's friend Art the Artist.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E8 - V for Valentine-detta
metas.description: After a rough break up on Valentine's Day, the Belcher women have a limo girls' night out to make Tina feel better. Meanwhile, Bob and Gene have a trapeze experience that brings them closer.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E9 - Y Tu Ga-Ga Tambien
metas.description: When a new playground game is introduced, the school's social hierarchy is turned upside-down and Gene disapproves. Meanwhile, Linda fills in for the local library storyteller and pulls out all the stops to perfect her storyteller persona.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E10 - The Secret Ceramics Room of Secrets
metas.description: When the kids are given the task of making homemade gifts for their grandma's birthday, they set out to find a secret room filled with homemade ceramics which, according to urban legend, has been boarded up for years at their school. Meanwhile, Teddy starts a phone repair service and the adults become determined to improve his online rating.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E11 - Sleeping With the Frenemy
metas.description: Tina allows Tammy to spend Spring Break with the Belchers - and even plays Cupid, setting up Tammy with Brett, a boy from out of town. Then, Gene and Bob enlist the help of Dr. Yap in finding a replacement baby tooth to complete Linda's collection, after Gene loses his own.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E12 - The Hurt Soccer
metas.description: After forgetting that they signed up Louise for a soccer league, the Belchers must help her prepare to play in the season's last game. With Bob coaching the soccer game, Linda and Gene seize the opportunity to turn the restaurant into a piano bar.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E13 - Cheer Up, Sleepy Gene
metas.description: Gene gets invited to his first sleepover and is nervous about it, and when things don't go as planned, he realizes he had a right to be. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda record themselves while sleeping to prove who snores more.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E14 - The Trouble with Doubles
metas.description: Bob and Linda's double-date plans take a disastrous turn when the couples find themselves trapped inside an Escape Room. Meanwhile, with the parents out of the house, Louise hosts a zombie-movie night, but when the zombies turn out to be too scary, Tina must take charge.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E15 - Go Tina on the Mountain
metas.description: The Belcher kids go to Outdoor Education only to have it rain, but Tina doesn't let the inclement weather get in the way of her having a nature-piphany, with the help of a hermit living in the woods. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda experience what it's like to be empty-nesters.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E16 - Are You There Bob? It's Me, Birthday
metas.description: After forgetting Bob's birthday, Linda and the kids attempt to plan a last-minute surprise party. In order to plan the party though, Linda asks Hugo if Bob can go with him while he's doing restaurant health inspections.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E17 - Boywatch
metas.description: Tina decides to join the Junior Lifeguards, but when she struggles with the training, one of her fellow junior guards, Parker, tries to convince her to quit. Meanwhile, business booms when Bob and Linda offer free wi-fi at the restaurant, but it is soon threatened by a cyber-attack.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E18 - As I Walk Through the Alley of the Shadow of Ramps
metas.description: When a malicious juice truck owner tries to set up shop in the Belcher's alley, Louise devises a plan to win back their turf. Meanwhile, Linda learns that she can't always run to her sister's defense.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E19 - Mo Mommy Mo Problems
metas.description: The Belchers attend open houses for the free food, per Linda's "momnipotent" Mother's Day request. When Linda meets a charming real estate agent and agrees to a private showing, the kids stumble upon an unexpected surprise and the family ends up at the helm of a real estate scheme.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E20 - Mission Impos-slug-ble
metas.description: When Louise's extensive Burobu card collection gets confiscated at school, she devises a tricky plan to get them back. Meanwhile, Bob must give a eulogy for an old acquaintance, despite an unfortunate incident that happened years ago.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S8E21 - Something Old, Something New, Something Bob Caters for You
metas.description: Just as Bob wonders if working in the restaurant business is worth it, a couple who fell in love at the restaurant asks the Belchers to cater their wedding. When things don't go as planned, Linda tries to save the day.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E1 - Just One of the Boyz 4 Now for Now
metas.description: Convinced she's met the love of her life, Tina decides to disguise herself as a boy and sneak into the Boyz 4 Now auditions to find him. Back at the restaurant, Teddy asks the rest of the Belcher gang to nurse his baby rat back to health.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E2 - The Taking of Funtime One Two Three
metas.description: Desperate for the grand prize dune buggy at their local arcade, Louise, Tina and Gene devise a master plan, with the help of Mr. Fischoeder. Meanwhile, Teddy manages to convince Bob and Linda to take in a chicken by promising fresh eggs.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E3 - Tweentrepreneurs
metas.description: Tina, Louise, and Gene get a taste of business when they join the school's Tweentrepeneurs club. Back at the restaurant, Bob and Linda find themselves outsmarted by a dine-and-dasher.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E4 - Nightmare on Ocean Avenue Street
metas.description: The kids set out for their regular Halloween shenanigans, but when everyone's candy bags start mysteriously disappearing, it's up to Tina, Louise, and Gene to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Teddy decorates the restaurant to compete with another handyman on the street but gets a little carried away.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E5 - Live and Let Fly
metas.description: The kids learn the dangers of revenge when their plan to get back at the school guidance counselor gets them entangled in a deep rooted sibling rivalry between two pilots. Meanwhile, Linda and Bob put their game faces on when Teddy invites them to a paper airplane contest.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E6 - Bobby Driver
metas.description: Bob agrees to drive professional quilter Edith around town, after she convinces him to join in a plot for revenge. Meanwhile, the kids attend a lavish "Gatsby"-themed birthday party, and Linda helps Teddy expand his taste palate.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E7 - I Bob Your Pardon
metas.description: The Belchers set out to save a turkey from a trip to the slaughterhouse, but when a local reporter catches wind of their schemes, the mission becomes more complicated than they had anticipated.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E8 - Roller? I Hardly Know Her!
metas.description: Gene is livid when his best friend, Alex, ditches him to be Courtney's roller-dancing partner. Meanwhile, Teddy, Linda and Bob let their imaginations get the best of them when they discover someone stalking the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E9 - UFO No You Didn't
metas.description: Tina and her new science partner create a device that allows them to communicate with aliens, but their excitement turns to fear when they receive a dangerous warning message. Meanwhile, Bob attempts to sell mini coat racks he bought.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E10 - Better Off Sled
metas.description: The battle is on when some angsty teenagers take over Louise, Gene and Tina's usual sledding territory, inciting an epic turf war. Meanwhile, Bob steps in to help Linda, who's in a time crunch to get three scarves knitted before Christmas.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E11 - Lorenzo's Oil? No, Linda's
metas.description: Linda's new friend introduces her to essential oils and Aunt Gayle is convinced she must be rescued. Meanwhile, Bob and Teddy are bamboozled into performing a series of annoying favors for Mr. Huggins.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E12 - The Helen Hunt
metas.description: The Belchers make it their mission to help Teddy get his dream girl, but Tina is convinced she's found a better match for him.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E13 - Bed, Bob & Beyond
metas.description: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it's up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E14 - Every Which Way But Goose
metas.description: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E15 - The Fresh Princ-ipal
metas.description: Things get out of hand when Louise wins a contest to be Principal for a Day. Meanwhile, Teddy attempts to help Bob when he suddenly finds himself unable to flip burgers

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E16 - Roamin' Bob-iday
metas.description: The family forces workaholic Bob to take a much-needed day off, only for him to wind up working at a local sandwich shop. Meanwhile, Linda and the kids throw a last minute baby shower at the restaurant for a female biker group.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E17 - What About Blob?
metas.description: Gene convinces Tina and Louise to help him save a misunderstood plankton blob from being destroyed by a yacht club.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E18 - If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
metas.description: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E19 - Long Time Listener, First Time Bob
metas.description: Bob meets his personal hero - a renegade radio DJ who refuses to compromise. However, the Belchers get in over their heads when they try to help him stage a comeback.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E20 - The Gene Mile
metas.description: When the kids have to run a mandatory mile for school on free-ice-cream-day, they hatch an elaborate plot to sneak away. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda frantically try to secure discount tickets to a show at the Wharf Arts Center.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E21 - P.T.A. It Ain't So
metas.description: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S9E22 - Yes Without My Zeke
metas.description: When Zeke gets in trouble, the Belcher kids and Jimmy Jr. pitch in to help prevent him from being sent to a disciplinary school. However, Tina tries to thwart their mission, so she can have Jimmy Jr. and his butt all to herself. Meanwhile, Randy rents out Bob's Burgers to shoot his independent short feature film.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E1 - The Ring (But Not Scary)
metas.description: Bob's plan to surprise Linda for their anniversary gets tricky when the kids become involved.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E2 - Boys Just Wanna Have Fungus
metas.description: Unable to afford a rare gourmet mushroom for a Burger of the Day, Bob and Gene jump into the cutthroat world of mushroom foraging. Meanwhile, Tina's powerful new prescription glasses lead her to believe she has a superpower.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E3 - Motor, She Boat
metas.description: Tina and Bob participate in the Thundergirls father-daughter cardboard boat race and Tina tries to hide her feelings about Bob's terrible boat-building skills. Meanwhile, Linda drags Louise and Gene to a fire station open house and overstays her welcome.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E4 - Pig Trouble in Little Tina
metas.description: Tina dissects a fetal pig in science class and things get spooky. Also, Bob and Linda do battle with a giant ball of ear wax.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E5 - Legends of the Mall
metas.description: On a Belcher family trip to the mall, Tina is mistaken for a sleeping boy's girlfriend. Meanwhile, Gene and Louise are turned loose on motorized animals, Linda disrupts a book reading and Bob struggles to shop for acceptable pants.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E6 - The Hawkening: Look Who's Hawking Now!
metas.description: Bob and Louise are riding high, hosting an exclusive screening of a Hawk & Chick movie at the restaurant, until the actor who plays Hawk throws a wrench into the works, for his own mysterious reasons.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E7 - Land of the Loft
metas.description: Bob and Linda challenge themselves and attend a loft party on a stormy night, while the kids challenge their babysitter, Jen, and face the storm in an ice cream truck.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E8 - Now We're Not Cooking With Gas
metas.description: Bob is determined to do whatever it takes to cook a rare, heritage turkey after the gas goes out on Thanksgiving.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E9 - All That Gene
metas.description: Gene auditions for a small role in a local theater production, but things backfire when he discovers that Linda actually bargained with the director to get Gene the part.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E10 - Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas
metas.description: Linda works a temp job at the post office to make extra money for the holidays. But when an important package goes undelivered, Linda breaks protocol and takes it upon herself to save the day. Meanwhile, Bob and Tina are trapped at home with Linda's fussy family and Gene and Louise scramble last-minute to find the perfect gift for Tina.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E11 - Drumforgiven
metas.description: Gene gets kicked out of the Ocean Avenue Hifi Emporium, but Louise takes matters into her own hands to defend Gene's honor. Teddy takes a handyman job at Jimmy Pesto's restaurant and tries to hide it from Bob.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E12 - A Fish Called Tina
metas.description: Tina goes too far trying to be a perfect mentor. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda test out the gym next door.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E13 - Three Girls and a Little Wharfy
metas.description: Louise skeptically joins Jessica and fifth-grader Megan in their search for Wharfy, a mythical sea monster, while Bob takes an online master class by a world-renowned chef.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E14 - Wag the Song
metas.description: Tina competes against Gene and Louise to write a new school song for Wagstaff but finds herself creatively stalled. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda battle blinding glare from Jimmy Pesto's new shiny steel awning across the street.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E15 - Yurty Rotten Scoundrels
metas.description: When Gayle decides to host an artists' workshop in a yurt with only one attendee, Linda feels compelled to go to support her sister. Meanwhile, Louise and Gene lead a covert operation to find a lost cat for a cash reward.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E16 - Flat-Top O' the Morning to Ya
metas.description: Bob and the kids help a down-on-his-luck restaurant owner, while Linda and Teddy get carried away with St. Patrick's Day festivities.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E17 - Just the Trip
metas.description: The family takes an unexpected road trip with Nat the limo driver.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E18 - Tappy Tappy Tappy Tap Tap Tap
metas.description: Tina goes to see Josh perform in a tap show, and suspects sabotage when he's injured on stage.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E19 - The Handyman Can
metas.description: When Teddy finds himself doubting his abilities as a handyman, the kids build up his confidence.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E20 - Poops!... I Didn't Do It Again
metas.description: Louise must face her fear of public pooping when her class goes on an overnight trip to the aquarium. Meanwhile, Linda enlists the family to make a video for her parents' anniversary.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E21 - Local She-ro
metas.description: While trying to show Tina what's great about their town, Linda ends up on the trail of a legendary local singer. Meanwhile, Teddy turns to Bob for help in arguing with a sports radio host.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S10E22 - Prank You for Being a Friend
metas.description: A classmate comes to Louise for lessons in how to get in trouble. Meanwhile, Bob reluctantly agrees to bring Jimmy Pesto his hernia medication.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E1 - Dream a Little Bob of Bob
metas.description: Bob goes on an epic quest to find a misplaced lock box key. Tina attempts to learn a hand-slapping song that everyone can do - but her.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E2 - Worms of In-Rear-Ment
metas.description: When the family prepares for a night out, they have to abort their plans when one certain member catches the pinworm.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E3 - Copa-Bob-bana
metas.description: Bob agrees to be the temporary chef at the Fischoeders' new nightclub; the kids throw a pool party in the restaurant basement when they get a hold of a stock tank.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E4 - Heartbreak Hotel-oween
metas.description: The kids meet a mysterious old woman at a hotel on Halloween as Louise plots her revenge for a candy transgression; Bob and Linda donate blood at a vampire-themed blood mobile.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E5 - Fast Time Capsules at Wagstaff School
metas.description: Tina is put in charge of the Wagstaff School time capsule project, but she makes an enemy when she rejects Tammy's submission.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E6 - Bob Belcher and the Terrible, Horrible, No Good, Very Bad Kids
metas.description: The family must figure out how to keep the restaurant open after Bob's flattop breaks on the morning of the Ocean Avenue Business Association's: Ocean Fest on Ocean Avenue.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E7 - Diarrhea of a Poopy Kid
metas.description: When Gene can't eat Thanksgiving dinner because of a stomach flu, the family tries to cheer him up.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E8 - The Terminalator II: Terminals of Endearment
metas.description: When Linda's parents have a layover at an airport nearby, Bob and Linda attempt to turn it into their annual "visit."

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E9 - Mommy Boy
metas.description: When Linda joins a women's business group, Gene gets possessive of her time. Meanwhile, Louise and Tina want to learn how to fight.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E10 - Yachty or Nice
metas.description: When the Belchers get an unexpected invitation to cater the Glencrest Yacht Club's holiday boat parade, Bob wonders if there's a catch. Meanwhile, Louise has her eye on the present-loaded Santa Schooner.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E11 - Romancing the Beef
metas.description: Louise convinces her parents to cash in on the lucrative Valentine's Day dinner business, even though it means putting Bob and Linda's own Valentine's Day plans on hold. Meanwhile, Tina attends Tammy's Anti-Valentine's Day party.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E12 - Die Card, or Card Trying
metas.description: Linda drags Bob and the kids out into nature, determined to take the best holiday family portrait ever.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E13 - An Incon-wheelie-ent Truth
metas.description: While on a family trip to the flea market, Bob and Linda are haunted by a lie they told Tina, Gene and Louise about what really happened to their beloved stuffed animal, Wheelie Mammoth.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E14 - Mr. Lonely Farts
metas.description: When Linda and Tina go to the shoe store, Gene accidently is left home by himself. Meanwhile, Bob, Louise and Teddy go to buy restaurant equipment from a creepy guy whom Bob found on the internet.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E15 - Sheshank Redumption
metas.description: Linda's new routine of diet and exercise gives her gastrointestinal trouble on the day of parent-teacher-student conferences.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E16 - Y Tu Tina También
metas.description: When Tina is forced to listen to Spanish audio lessons in the library to improve her grade, she develops an unexpected crush. Meanwhile, Louise and Gene want to dunk Mr. Frond at the Wagstaff Spring Fair.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E17 - Fingers-loose
metas.description: Tina faces a hall-monitor crisis when she falls in love with a new underground trend at Wagstaff that Mr. Frond is trying to squelch. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda try to come up with a way for Teddy to sneak food into a movie theater.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E18 - Some Kind of Fender Benderful
metas.description: When Bob gets into a four-car fender bender right outside the restaurant, he realizes finding out who is at fault will not be as simple as he thought.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E19 - Bridge Over Troubled Rudy
metas.description: Louise ropes her siblings into an adventure; Mort teaches Bob, Linda and Teddy how to meditate.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E20 - Steal Magazine-olias
metas.description: The Belcher kids get caught up in a game of cat-and-mouse when Dr. Yap comes to the restaurant in search of something that was taken from the waiting room of his dentistry office. Meanwhile, Bob, Linda and Teddy try to clean a huge bird poop off the restaurant's window.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E21 - Tell Me Dumb Thing Good
metas.description: Linda needs the kids' help in fighting for a fun, dumb, local tradition. Meanwhile, Bob is captivated by an online cucumber.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S11E22 - Vampire Disco Death Dance
metas.description: After Tina and Bob plan a father-daughter date to see Bob's favorite old campy vampire-sing-along movie, Tina decides to invite her group of friends along, as well. Meanwhile, Linda opens a restaurant for the raccoons in their alley.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E1 - Manic Pixie Crap Show
metas.description: Louise must pay a debt to Millie by attending the Pixie Princess Promenade. Meanwhile, a bouquet in the shape of a dog forces Linda to confront her past.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E2 - Crystal Mess
metas.description: In order to help with anxiety about an upcoming oral report, Mr. Frond lends Tina a crystal that his new girlfriend alleges has special powers. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda buy a box of imperfect produce and try to use it all before it rots.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E3 - The Pumpkinening
metas.description: When a mysterious note is sent to Linda on Halloween, she and Gayle must travel to their hometown to face a wrong they committed 27 years ago.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E4 - Driving Big Dummy
metas.description: Bob gets roped into a road trip with Teddy while Linda and the kids compete for the title of employee of the day.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E5 - Seven-tween Again
metas.description: Gene has a freak-out about growing up and desperately tries to relive his youth; Linda is tempted to try the fancy new hair salon that opened up next to Bob's Burgers, but she's scared of her hairdresser Gretchen's wrath.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E6 - Beach, Please
metas.description: When the Belcher kids participate in a beach clean-up for Wagstaff Volunteer Day, Louise gets drawn into a battle of wits with Mr. Fischoeder; Teddy surprises Bob and Linda with a new look.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E7 - Loft in Bedslation
metas.description: Linda and the girls attempt to build a loft bed for Louise in just one day; Bob and Gene host a group of gamers.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E8 - Stuck in the Kitchen with You
metas.description: When Bob volunteers to cook Thanksgiving dinner for a retirement home, Louise gets stuck helping him on his most intense cooking day of the year. Meanwhile, Gene and Tina try to help Zeke entertain the residents.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E9 - FOMO You Didn't
metas.description: Susmita offers to help Tina with a photography class assignment, but Tina can't stop thinking about all the fun Tammy, Jocelyn, Zeke and Jimmy Jr. are having ditching class. Meanwhile, a woman who used to live in the Belchers' apartment comes for a visit.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E10 - Gene's Christmas Break
metas.description: After Gene breaks his favorite, extremely rare '70s era Christmas record, Tina and Louise join him in the search for another copy. Meanwhile, Teddy wants to do a neighborhood Secret Santa with Bob and Linda.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E11 - Touch of Eval(uations)
metas.description: Louise realizes the new plan for student evaluating teachers has shifted the power at school from teacher to student; Bob and Linda find they don't agree on where their final resting place should be.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E12 - Ferry on My Wayward Bob and Linda
metas.description: Bob and Linda accept a Valentine's Day dinner invitation from the chef of a fancy restaurant; the kids have a scheme to get cheap Valentine's Day candy, but first they'll have to make it past an unusually strict babysitter.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E13 - Frigate Me Knot
metas.description: Linda encourages Teddy to attend a farewell ceremony for the ship on which he served in the Navy, but it means confronting his Navy pals and his past.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E14 - Video Killed the Gene-io Star
metas.description: Gene begrudgingly agrees to participate in a music video for Courtney; Teddy and Linda obsess over a mysterious customer at the restaurant.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E15 - Ancient Misbehavin
metas.description: After feeling slighted by a teacher during a special Ancient Greece unit, Louise, Millie and Regular Sized Rudy take matters into their own hands to restore justice. Meanwhile, Bob gets a room of his own.

metas.name: Bob's Burgers - S12E16 - Interview with a Pop-pop-pire
