metas.name: Frasier - S1E1 - The Good Son
metas.description: Psychiatrist Frasier Crane returns to his hometown of Seattle to host a radio talk show, but soon discovers he could use a shrink himself when his father moves in.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E2 - Space Quest
metas.description: Fed up with a lack of privacy at home and at work, Frasier decides it's time for his father to move out.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E3 - Dinner at Eight
metas.description: It's a culinary culture clash when Frasier and Niles join their father for dinner at his favorite restaurant.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E4 - I Hate Frasier Crane
metas.description: After trading barbs with a newspaper columnist, Frasier rises to the challenge of a fist fight.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E5 - Here's Looking at You
metas.description: Frasier plays matchmaker for his father and the eligible bachelorette Martin spied through his telescope.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E6 - The Crucible
metas.description: Frasier is furious when he learns that his newest art purchase is actually a fake.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E7 - Call Me Irresponsible
metas.description: Frasier faces a personal and professional dilemma when he begins dating the ex-girlfriend of one of his radio show callers.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E8 - Beloved Infidel
metas.description: When Frasier and Niles see their father dining with an old family friend, they conclude that Martin once had an affair with the woman.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E9 - Selling Out
metas.description: When Frasier is lured into doing on-air endorsements, his professional credibility comes under fire.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E10 - Oops
metas.description: When Frasier contributes to the rumor mill, he causes Bulldog to lose his job.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E11 - Death Becomes Him
metas.description: When a seemingly healthy colleague dies unexpectedly, Frasier becomes obsessed with his own mortality.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E12 - Miracle on Third or Fourth Street
metas.description: When his son cannot spend the holidays with him, a melancholy Frasier learns the true spirit of Christmas from a group of strangers.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E13 - Guess Who's Coming To Breakfast?
metas.description: Martin is furious with Frasier when he spills the secrets of his father's love life on the air.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E14 - Can't Buy Me Love
metas.description: Frasier looks forward to a hot date with a beautiful model who "bought" him in a celebrity bachelor auction.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E15 - You Can't Tell a Crook by His Cover
metas.description: After Frasier claims he can spot a criminal in a crowd, Martin challenges him to identify the ex-con in his poker group.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E16 - The Show Where Lilith Comes Back
metas.description: After finding a long-lost letter of reconciliation from Frasier, Lilith comes to Seattle and tries to rekindle their relationship.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E17 - A Midwinter Night's Dream
metas.description: Niles faces the ultimate temptation when he and Daphne are trapped in his home during a violent storm.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E18 - And the Whimper is...
metas.description: When Frasier's show is nominated for a local broadcasting award, Roz suggests they "persuade" the judges by plying them with gifts.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E19 - Give Him the Chair!
metas.description: Frasier learns that sentiment is more important than style after he accidentally loses his father's old armchair.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E20 - Fortysomething
metas.description: Panicked at the prospect of growing old, Frasier seeks solace in the pursuit of a pretty young woman who shows an interest in him.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E21 - Travels with Martin
metas.description: Frasier's attempts at a father-son vacation turn into an outrageous road trip, with Niles and Daphne along for the ride.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E22 - Author, Author
metas.description: Sibling rivalry flares when Frasier and Niles decide to collaborate on a self-help book.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E23 - Frasier Crane's Day Off
metas.description: While home sick with the flu, Frasier becomes paranoid that everyone, including his own brother Niles, is out to take over his show.

metas.name: Frasier - S1E24 - My Coffee with Niles
metas.description: When Niles asks Frasier if he's happy after his first year back in Seattle, the question opens up a comical and revealing family dialogue.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E1 - Slow Tango in South Seattle
metas.description: Frasier discovers that a steamy best seller was based on his affair with an older woman.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E2 - The Unkindest Cut of All
metas.description: After Eddie fathers a litter of illegitimate pups, Frasier goes behind Martin's back to get the dog neutered.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E3 - The Matchmaker
metas.description: Frasier's plan to "fix up" Daphne with his new boss goes awry when Frasier learns his secret.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E4 - Flour Child
metas.description: After witnessing a woman give birth, Niles decides it's time to practice his parenting skills -- on a sack of flour!

metas.name: Frasier - S2E5 - Duke's We Hardly Knew Ye'
metas.description: Frasier and Niles are upset when they learn that they're investors in the company slated to demolish their father's favorite hangout.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E6 - The Botched Language of the Cranes
metas.description: Frasier endures the wrath of Seattle residents after he "slams" the city in an on- air tirade.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E7 - The Candidate
metas.description: Frasier agrees to make a television commercial for his candidate of choice in a local election, only to learn some very distressing information moments before they film.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E8 - Adventures in Paradise (1)
metas.description: Frasier's budding relationship is put to the test when he bumps into his ex-wife Lilith while on vacation with his new love.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E9 - Adventures in Paradise (2)
metas.description: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E10 - Burying a Grudge
metas.description: Martin finds it hard to "forgive and forget" when he runs into a former police buddy who's in the hospital.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E11 - Seat of Power
metas.description: Frasier and Niles confront the bullies who used to torment them in junior high school.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E12 - Roz in the Doghouse
metas.description: Roz and Frasier discover that breaking up is hard to do after Roz takes a new job as Bulldog's producer.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E13 - Retirement Is Murder
metas.description: Frasier plays amateur sleuth after becoming caught up in Martin's obsession with a twenty-year-old unsolved murder.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E14 - Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice...
metas.description: After a thief steals Frasier's briefcase and his car, Frasier sets a trap to catch him in the act.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E15 - You Scratch My Book...
metas.description: Frasier falls for a pop psychologist whose stunning beauty blinds him to the fact that he doesn't respect her "New Age" beliefs.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E16 - The Show Where Sam Shows Up
metas.description: Frasier receives a surprise visit from his Boston buddy Sam Malone, who just left his girlfriend standing at the altar.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E17 - Daphne's Room
metas.description: When Frasier's caught in Daphne's room, his attempts to rectify the invasion of her privacy only make the situation worse.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E18 - The Club
metas.description: Niles and Frasier sabotage each other's chances for acceptance into Seattle's prestigious Empire Club.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E19 - Someone to Watch over Me
metas.description: The attentiveness of an overzealous fan leads Frasier to fear that he's the object of an obsessed stalker

metas.name: Frasier - S2E20 - Breaking the Ice
metas.description: Stranded for the night in an old ice fishing shack, Frasier confronts his father's inability to say "I love you" to his sons.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E21 - An Affair to Forget
metas.description: Frasier learns that Niles's wife may be having an affair with her fencing instructor

metas.name: Frasier - S2E22 - Agents in America, Part III
metas.description: Frasier's tough-as-nails agent uses extreme measures to renegotiate his contract with the radio station.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E23 - The Innkeepers
metas.description: On a whim, Frasier and Niles decide to buy one of Seattle's oldest and finest restaurants.

metas.name: Frasier - S2E24 - Dark Victory
metas.description: Martin's birthday brings Frasier's friends and family together, but Frasier soon finds himself mediating evervone's problems

metas.name: Frasier - S3E1 - She's the Boss
metas.description: When Frasier refuses to change his show to suit his new female boss, she banishes him to the "graveyard" shift.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E2 - Shrink Rap
metas.description: A psychotherapy partnership between Frasier and Niles brings out the worst in their relationship.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E3 - Martin Does It His Way
metas.description: The death of Frasier's great aunt inspires Martin to pursue his lifelong dream of writing a song for Frank Sinatra.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E4 - Leapin' Lizards
metas.description: Frasier decides to retaliate against Bulldog's childish pranks with a trick of his own, which winds up putting the new station manager in the hospital.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E5 - Kisses Sweeter Than Wine
metas.description: While Frasier frantically prepares to host an important party, Niles tries to dissuade Daphne from pursuing a romance with Frasier's contractor.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E6 - Sleeping with the Enemy (1)
metas.description: Labor relations go from heated to hot and heavy when Frasier and his boss negotiate a staff raise -- and an unexpected passion for each other.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E7 - The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl (2)
metas.description: Frasier and Kate vow to end their office romance, but can't seem to keep their hands off each other!

metas.name: Frasier - S3E8 - The Last Time I Saw Maris
metas.description: Niles follows Frasier's advice to stand up to Maris, but she responds by asking for a divorce.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E9 - Frasier Grinch
metas.description: Frasier's thrilled by the prospect of a Christmas visit from his son, but he's forced to brave the mall on Christmas Eve to find just the right gift.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E10 - It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
metas.description: Frasier realizes he has strong feelings for Kate, just when she announces that she's relocating to Chicago.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E11 - The Friend
metas.description: Frasier befriends Bob, a wheelchair-bound man whom he doesn't have the heart to "dump" after he discovers they have nothing in common.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E12 - Come Lie with Me
metas.description: Frasier is uncomfortable when Daphne's boyfriend spends the night in her room, but soon finds he's even more uncomfortable with the prospect of Daphne moving out.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E13 - Moon Dance
metas.description: Realizing that it's time he started dating again, Niles takes Daphne to a society ball.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E14 - The Show Where Diane Comes Back
metas.description: The arrival of Diane Chambers in Seattle puts Frasier on an emotional roller coaster ride.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E15 - A Word to the Wiseguy
metas.description: When Maris gets in trouble with the law, Niles seeks the help of a shady character who will solve the problem in return for a "favor."

metas.name: Frasier - S3E16 - Look Before You Leap
metas.description: In honor of Leap Year, Frasier urges his friends and family members to try something daring, but their own "leaps" don't turn out as expected.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E17 - High Crane Drifter
metas.description: Much to his chagrin, Frasier becomes a local hero after he physically assaults a rude customer at Cafe Nervosa.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E18 - Chess Pains
metas.description: Frasier challenges his father to a game of chess, but when Martin wins, Frasier becomes obsessed with beating him.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E19 - Crane vs. Crane
metas.description: Frasier and Niles square off in a court battle over the competency of an eccentric millionaire.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E20 - Police Story
metas.description: Frasier sets his sights on a female police officer who actually has a crush on his father.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E21 - Where There's Smoke There's Fired
metas.description: The new station owner asks Frasier to help his fiancee stop smoking, but Frasier panics when he realizes who his "patient" is.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E22 - Frasier Loves Roz
metas.description: Roz mistakenly thinks Frasier is in love with her when he tries to break up her new relationship.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E23 - The Focus Group
metas.description: When Frasier learns that one member of a focus group doesn't like his show, he stops at nothing to find out the reason.

metas.name: Frasier - S3E24 - You Can Go Home Again
metas.description: Listening to a tape of his very first radio show sends Frasier on a somewhat uncomfortable trip down Memory Lane.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E1 - The Two Mrs. Cranes
metas.description: The Crane household is turned upside down when Daphne's old flame comes to town.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E2 - Love Bites Dog
metas.description: When Roz sets Frasier up on a blind date, Bulldog winds up falling for her instead.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E3 - The Impossible Dream
metas.description: When Frasier is awakened night after night by a recurring dream, he becomes obsessed with analyzing the psychological meaning behind it.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E4 - A Crane's Critique
metas.description: After Martin befriends a reclusive writer both Frasier and Niles admire, they become obsessed with reading the author's first manuscript in decades.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E5 - Head Game
metas.description: While filling in for Frasier, Niles gains fame after counseling a local basketball star who's in a slump.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E6 - Mixed Doubles
metas.description: After Daphne gets dumped by her boyfriend, Niles decides it's time to declare his love for her.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E7 - A Lilith Thanksgiving
metas.description: Frasier and Lilith join forces so that their son can gain admission to the most prestigious private school in Boston.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E8 - Our Father Whose Art Ain't Heaven
metas.description: Martin buys Frasier an expensive painting -- but Frasier doesn't have the heart to tell his father that he hates it.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E9 - Dad Loves Sherry, the Boys Just Whine
metas.description: Frasier and Niles disapprove of Martin's relationship with his brassy new girlfriend.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E10 - Liar! Liar!
metas.description: Frasier finds himself in a precarious position when he tries to help the troubled marriage of a former high school acquaintance.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E11 - Three Days of the Condo
metas.description: When Frasier becomes fed up with the rules and regulations governing his condominium complex, he decides to run for condo board president.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E12 - Death and the Dog
metas.description: Eddie feels blue, so Martin hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of his depression.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E13 - Four for the Seesaw
metas.description: When the Crane brothers go away for the weekend with two attractive women, Niles discovers he hasn't quite cut his emotional ties to Maris.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E14 - To Kill a Talking Bird
metas.description: Niles moves into a prestigious building and tries to impress his snobby neighbors with an elegant dinner party.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E15 - Roz's Krantz & Gouldenstein Are Dead
metas.description: While volunteering at a retirement home, Roz becomes convinced that she's "the angel of death" after her first two patients die on her.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E16 - The Unnatural
metas.description: Rather than show his son that his dad's not perfect, Frasier agrees to join the station's softball team -- even though he has no idea how to play the game.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E17 - Roz's Turn
metas.description: When an on-air hosting spot opens up at the station, Roz decides to go for it -- but Frasier's agent has other ideas.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E18 - Ham Radio
metas.description: Frasier's attempts to produce a live, 1940s-style radio drama for the station's fiftieth anniversary produce chaos instead.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E19 - Three Dates and a Breakup (1)
metas.description: While Frasier tries to juggle three dates in three days, Martin and his girlfriend face the prospect of breaking up.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E20 - Three Dates and a Breakup (2)
metas.description: Frasier tries to get Martin and Sherry to reconcile -- to the detriment of his own love life.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E21 - Daphne Hates Sherry
metas.description: Frasier and Niles are caught in the middle when Martin's girlfriend and Daphne can't stop bickering.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E22 - Are You Being Served?
metas.description: Frasier tries to console Niles after Maris serves him with divorce papers.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E23 - Ask Me No Questions
metas.description: When Niles asks Frasier whether he and Maris belong together, Frasier goes out of his way to give his brother an honest, thoughtful response.

metas.name: Frasier - S4E24 - Odd Man Out
metas.description: Frasier comes down with a case of the "bachelor blues" when he realizes that every single person he knows is dating someone -- except him.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E1 - Frasier's Imaginary Friend
metas.description: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to be dating a famous supermodel.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E2 - The Gift Horse
metas.description: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and "top" each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E3 - Halloween
metas.description: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E4 - The Kid
metas.description: Frasier is stunned when he learns the true identity of the man who is the father of Roz's baby.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E5 - The 1000th Show
metas.description: Niles' envy and a series of mishaps may prevent Frasier from attending the festivities honoring him for his 1,000th radio show.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E6 - Voyage of the Damned
metas.description: To take Niles' mind off his marital problems, Frasier invites him on an Alasakan cruise -- but neglects to tell Niles he's also invited Maris as a "surprise."

metas.name: Frasier - S5E7 - My Fair Frasier
metas.description: Frasier falls for a high-powered lawyer, whose successful career and takecharge attitude turns Frasier into a "wimp."

metas.name: Frasier - S5E8 - Desperately Seeking Closure
metas.description: When, Frasier gets "dumped" by his high-powered girlfriend Sam, he makes a fool of himself trying to win her back.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E9 - Perspectives on Christmas
metas.description: It's a Christmas to remember when Martin sings in a church pageant, Niles gets stuck in an elevator, and Frasier spills the beans about Roz's pregnancy to her unsuspecting mother.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E10 - Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
metas.description: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at "her" hangout.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E11 - Ain't Nobody's Business if 'I Do'
metas.description: The discovery of an engagement ring hidden in their father's drawer leads Niles and Frasier to investigate Sherry's checkered past before Martin has a chance to "pop the question."

metas.name: Frasier - S5E12 - The Zoo Story
metas.description: Fed up with his cutthroat agent Bebe, Frasier soon learns the high price of hiring a "nice" agent to represent him in contract negotiations.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E13 - The Maris Counselor
metas.description: Niles is shocked to discover that his trusted marriage counselor and Maris are having a torrid affair behind his back.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E14 - The Ski Lodge
metas.description: A weekend ski trip snowballs into a hotbed of romantic antics for Frasier, Niles and their friends.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E15 - Room Service
metas.description: An unexpected visit from Lilith stirs old passions in Frasier and new ones in Niles.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E16 - Beware of Greeks
metas.description: Sparks fly when a family wedding re-ignites a long-simmering feud between Frasier and his fiery Greek Aunt Zora.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E17 - The Perfect Guy
metas.description: The radio station hires a handsome new doctor to host a call-in medical show, but Frasier, nursing his male ego, is determined to find a flaw in his new colleague, who seems just a little "too perfect."

metas.name: Frasier - S5E18 - Bad Dog
metas.description: When Bulldog wrongfully takes credit for foiling a robbery and saving Roz's life, Frasier becomes determined to make Bulldog "come clean."

metas.name: Frasier - S5E19 - Frasier Gotta Have It
metas.description: Frasier's torn between his "lust" for his latest conquest and the realization that they have nothing in common.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E20 - First Date
metas.description: Niles gets Daphne to help him plan a phony dinner date with a neighbor so she won't realize how much he really cares for her.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E21 - Roz and the Schnoz
metas.description: Roz worries about the fate of her new baby when she discovers that the parents of her baby's father have two of the biggest noses she's ever seen.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E22 - The Life of the Party
metas.description: Desperate to make a love connection, Frasier and Niles join forces to throw a singles party -- and end up vying for the affections of the same woman.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E23 - Party, Party
metas.description: Frasier attempts to be in three places at once as he tries to keep his girlfriend, brother and dad happy.

metas.name: Frasier - S5E24 - Sweet Dreams
metas.description: When Frasier leads a protest demanding better treatment of radio station employees, the head honcho at the station's parent company has another idea in mind.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E1 - Good Grief
metas.description: When Frasier appears to be in denial over losing his job, Niles, Roz and Martin join forces to bring him back to reality.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E2 - Frasier's Curse
metas.description: Frasier dreads the idea of attending his high school reunion, which always seems to coincide with a downturn in his life.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E3 - Dial M for Martin
metas.description: Niles isn't too thrilled at the prospect of his father moving in - until he realizes that Daphne is part of the package.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E4 - Hot Ticket
metas.description: Frasier and Niles will stop at nothing to get tickets to the hottest play in town.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E5 - First, Do No Harm
metas.description: Frasier suspects that his gorgeous new girlfriend is just using him to get free psychiatric advice.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E6 - Secret Admirer
metas.description: Mistakenly believing he's got a secret admirer, Frasier jeopardizes his new relationship by trying to double his pleasure.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E7 - How to Bury a Millionaire
metas.description: After Maris freezes Niles' assets, he's forced to sublet his luxurious apartment and move into a "low-rent" complex.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E8 - The Seal Who Came to Dinner
metas.description: Niles hosts a party at Maris' beach house in the hopes of winning his dinner club's prestigious 'Golden Apron' award. Niles panics when he discovers a very pungent--and very dead--seal on the beach.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E9 - Roz, a Loan
metas.description: Frasier loans Roz $1,500 to tide her over until they get their jobs back, then disapproves of the way she spends the money.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E10 - Merry Christmas, Mrs. Moskowitz
metas.description: Frasier is forced to feign Judaism when his girlfriend's Jewish mother visits. The charade is compounded by the apartment's holiday decor and Niles' participation in a Christmas pageant.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E11 - Good Samaritan
metas.description: Frasier is the one who could use some help after his good deeds backfire on him.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E12 - Our Parents, Ourselves
metas.description: Frasier and Roz play matchmakers for their parents - with disastrous results.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E13 - The Show where Woody Shows Up
metas.description: Frasier's old friend from Boston, Woody, visits. The two have a great time reminiscing but as the week goes on, Frasier realizes they have nothing in common... and Woody won't leave.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E14 - Three Valentines
metas.description: Valentine’s Day finds Niles, Frasier, Martin and Daphne on three very different kinds of dates.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E15 - To Tell the Truth
metas.description: Niles hires an aggressive new divorce lawyer who may wind up exposing his long-running crush on Daphne.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E16 - Decoys
metas.description: Niles secretly schemes to break up Daphne’s new romance with his divorce lawyer.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E17 - Dinner Party
metas.description: Frasier’s plans for an elegant dinner party are thwarted at every turn.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E18 - Taps at the Montana
metas.description: Facing eviction by his snooty tenants’ board, Niles throws a party in an effort to get back in their good graces.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E19 - IQ
metas.description: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they compare IQ scores.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E20 - Dr. Nora
metas.description: Frasier is horrified when the soft-spoken lady shrink he urged the station to hire turns out to be a tough-talking tyrant.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E21 - When a Man Loves Two Women
metas.description: Frasier’s torn between dating his old girlfriend or a voluptuous new flame.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E22 - Visions of Daphne
metas.description: To Niles’ delight, a series of psychic visions gives Daphne second thoughts about marrying Donny.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E23 - Shutout in Seattle (1)
metas.description: Despondent over Daphne’s engagement, Niles takes a walk on the wild side with a funky waitress from Café Nervosa.

metas.name: Frasier - S6E24 - Shutout in Seattle (2)
metas.description: The love lives of Frasier, Martin, Niles and Roz come crashing down around them.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E1 - Momma Mia
metas.description: Frasier's new girlfriend is loving, attentive-and a dead ringer for his late mother.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E2 - Father of the Bride
metas.description: Daphne is touched when Frasier agrees to pay for her wedding -- but aghast when he takes control of all the plans.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E3 - Radio Wars
metas.description: Frasier vows revenge after a pair of radio "shock jocks" embarrass him in a series of on-air pranks.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E4 - Everyone's a Critic
metas.description: Jealous of Niles' position as the arts critic for a snobby magazine, Frasier goes all out in his bid to host a cultural program on his radio station.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E5 - The Dog that Rocks the Cradle
metas.description: Roz hires Bulldog to babysit her daughter, not realizing he's out to bulldoze her social life.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E6 - Rivals
metas.description: Frasier and Niles crank their sibling rivalry up a notch when each believes the other is trying to steal his girlfriend.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E7 - A Tsar is Born
metas.description: After a family heirloom is linked to the Romanoffs, Frasier and Niles giddily assume they are descended from royalty.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E8 - The Late Dr. Crane
metas.description: An erroneous report that Frasier has died motivates him to do a makeover on his life.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E9 - The Apparent Trap
metas.description: When Lilith visits Seattle over Thanksgiving, Frederick conspires to reunite his parents.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E10 - Back Talk (1)
metas.description: Looped on pain medication for his ailing back, Frasier makes a startling announcement to Daphne.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E11 - The Fight Before Christmas (2)
metas.description: Knowing Niles loves her, Daphne is forced to confront how she really feels about him.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E12 - RDWRER
metas.description: After Frasier and Niles' New Year's plans fall through, they take a riotous road trip with Martin in his Winnebago.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E13 - They're Playing Our Song
metas.description: Frasier's attempt to write a simple theme song for his show turns into a major production for he and Martin.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E14 - Big Crane on Campus
metas.description: Frasier's "dream date" with a former prom queen turns out to be a living nightmare.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E15 - Out With Dad
metas.description: Martin pretends he's gay to get out of dating a woman he doesn't find attractive.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E16 - Something About Dr. Mary
metas.description: When Roz takes a vacation, Frasier's new call screener takes over Roz's job - and his show.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E17 - Whine Club
metas.description: Frasier and Niles uncork a bad case of sibling rivalry when they compete for a prestigious position in their wine club.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E18 - Hot Pursuit
metas.description: While Niles joins Martin on a stakeout, Roz and Frasier flirt with the idea of becoming more than just friends.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E19 - Morning Becomes Entertainment
metas.description: Frasier checks his professional dignity at the door when he becomes the cohost of a mindless morning TV show with his agent, Bebe.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E20 - To Thine Old Self Be True
metas.description: Frasier's budding romance is complicated by a stripper; Maris tries to sabotage Niles' new relationship.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E21 - Three Faces of Frasier
metas.description: Frasier's delight at having his caricature displayed in a famous local landmark dissolves once he sees the unflattering portrait.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E22 - Dark Side of the Moon
metas.description: The arrival of Daphne's obnoxious brother, Simon, unleashes an emotional torrent that drives her into therapy.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E23 - Something Borrowed, Someone Blue (1)
metas.description: Just when Daphne decides to profess her love for Niles, he drops a stunning bombshell.

metas.name: Frasier - S7E24 - Something Borrowed, Someone Blue (2)
metas.description: On the eve of her wedding, Daphne's torn between the man she loves and the man she's engaged to marry.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E1 - And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon (1)
metas.description: After running off together, Niles and Daphne face the wrath from their jilted lovers: Donny's suing for emotional distress and Mel's plotting a ruse.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E2 - And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon (2)
metas.description: Daphne considers dumping Niles after Donny and Mel's plotting stresses her out. Fortunately, Frasier comes to the lovers' aid once again.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E3 - The Bad Son
metas.description: Frasier's disdain for public transportation takes a back seat to his fancy for a cute bus passenger; Daphne and Niles make a stargazing date only to end up star-crossed again.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E4 - The Great Crane Robbery
metas.description: Frasier frets when his billionaire boss slavishly copies his aesthetic tastes, and Mel blackmails Niles into making a social faux pas.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E5 - Taking Liberties
metas.description: Frasier hires a British butler whose proper presence only adds to the chaos in the Crane household. Meanwhile, Mel steps up her efforts to torment Niles.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E6 - Legal Tender Love and Care
metas.description: Frasier hires a shady lady lawyer to defend him from a litigious Donny, who blames him for Daphne running out on their wedding.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E7 - The New Friend
metas.description: Roz introduces Frasier to her new boyfriend, Luke, and the two men hit it off. When Roz and Luke break up, Frasier, hides his continuing friendship with him while supporting Roz during her heartbreak.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E8 - Mary Christmas
metas.description: Frasier appears more jealous than jolly when he co-hosts Seattle's Christmas parade with his radio rival, Dr Mary; Niles and Daphne open their gifts early; and beer adds to Martin's holiday cheer.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E9 - Frasier's Edge
metas.description: A lifetime achievement award sends Frasier into an existential crisis which culminates in a battle of wits with his old mentor; Daphne's weight gain doesn't go unnoticed.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E10 - Cranes Unplugged
metas.description: Frasier gets a visit from his video-game obsessed son, Frederick; Daphne and Niles play Cupid for a lonely Roz.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E11 - Motor Skills
metas.description: Frasier and Niles realize their helplessness when Frasier's car stalls, so they enrol in an auto repair night class. They quickly fall behind, and understand what it's like to be remedial students.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E12 - The Show Must Go Off
metas.description: Frasier and Niles try to reawaken the career of Jackson Hedley, an old actor they saw perform Hamlet when they were young. When they see him perform again, however, they realize that he is talentless and will humiliate himself.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E13 - Sliding Frasiers
metas.description: Frasier is supposed to go to a speed-dating event and asks Roz if he should wear a suit or sweater, remarking that the slightest decision can have far-reaching effects. We see what would have happened in each circumstance.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E14 - Hungry Heart
metas.description: Kenny arrives at Frasier's place in a panic after unwittingly making a date with a woman even though he's married. Niles finally notices Daphne's weight gain.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E15 - Hooping Cranes
metas.description: Frasier receives tickets to the Sonics game and goes with Martin and Niles. Niles is selected to attempt the halftime half-court shot, and miraculously makes it, drinking in the adoration of Martin and the rest of Seattle.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E16 - Docu Drama
metas.description: Roz gets the green light to put on a special radio show about outer space, and agrees to let Frasier narrate. However, the two fail to come to grips with their reversed roles.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E17 - It Takes Two to Tangle
metas.description: Frasier and Niles press Martin's rich girlfriend to save their bankrupt prep school.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E18 - Forgotten But Not Gone
metas.description: Frasier leaves his wine club to host a new radio feature called "The Wine Corner" and is angered to learn that a resentful Niles - the club's overbearing "cork-master" has ordered it's old members not to participate in the program.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E19 - Daphne Returns
metas.description: Niles and Daphne "get real" about their romance.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E20 - The Wizard and Roz
metas.description: Daphne attempts to prove to Niles she has psychic visions and Frasier is ego-stricken when he discovers that Roz his having an affair with his mentor.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E21 - Semi-Decent Proposal (1)
metas.description: Frasier runs into an old high school friend and has found love with her friend, Claire.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E22 - A Passing Fancy (2)
metas.description: Frasier tutors Lana's son in exchange for a date with Claire. Martin goes to a dog party and Daphne and Niles have trouble sleeping in the same bed.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E23 - A Day in May
metas.description: Niles gets jealous of an old flame of Daphne's at the dog park; Frasier teaches Lana about honesty in selling a problematic piece of real estate and Martin secretly attends the parole hearing of the man who shot him.

metas.name: Frasier - S8E24 - The Cranes Go Caribbean
metas.description: Frasier's vacation plans with Claire turn disastrous when Daphne, Niles and Martin show up at the same resort and Frasier starts dreaming about Lana.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E1 - Don Juan in Hell (1)
metas.description: Frasier continues to be conflicted about whether he truly wants to be with Lana instead of Claire. He consults his family, but a chance encounter at the airport steers him toward making a decision. Unfortunately, he may be too late.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E2 - Don Juan in Hell (2)
metas.description: Troubled by his recent relationship woes, Frasier goes to the country for peace and quiet but ends up facing the ghosts of failed relationships past.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E3 - The First Temptation of Daphne
metas.description: Daphne stumbles across a file of one of Niles' patients, who is in love with him via "transference." Daphne's paranoia sends her to extreme lengths to learn anything she can about the woman.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E4 - The Return of Martin Crane
metas.description: Martin's new job triggers old memories.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E5 - Love Stinks
metas.description: Frasier hosts a party for the staff at the radio station to improve his image.  Meanwhile, Roz dates a garbageman and Niles recalls his childhood memories with Daphne.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E6 - Room Full of Heroes
metas.description: Frasier holds a 'Dress as Your Hero' Halloween party, but nobody can tell who he is.  Meanwhile, Niles dresses as Martin, Daphne as Elton John, Martin as Joe DiMaggio and Roz as Wonder Woman for the party.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E7 - Bla-Z-Boy
metas.description: An accident causes a mess on Frasier's carpet and the destruction of Martin's chair.  Meanwhile, Niles gives piano lessons to talented Roz and not-so-talented Daphne.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E8 - The Two Hundredth Episode
metas.description: Frasier has just completed his 2000th radio show, but discovers that one of the tapes of his collection of his broadcasts is missing. His quest to replace it borders on obsession, sending him spiralling into depression.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E9 - Sharing Kirby
metas.description: Blood pressures and spirits rise as an intern becomes the pawn in Frasier and Niles' battle over a wine cellar tour.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E10 - Junior Agent
metas.description: Frasier gets an annoying new agent in the middle of a competition between him and a rival radio broadcaster.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E11 - Bully for Martin
metas.description: After Frasier witnesses Martin get chewed out by his boss, Frasier feels obligated to say something on his behalf. However, it only serves to make things worse.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E12 - Mother Load (1)
metas.description: When Daphne and Niles decide to move in with each other, Daphne's mother and Simon arrive on a surprise visit.  Daphne and Niles decide to put off moving in together until her visiting relatives are gone.  Meanwhile, Frasier feuds with Cam Winston, his neighbor, over where Cam parks his large vehicle.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E13 - Mother Load (2)
metas.description: Daphne and Niles continue to try and hide the fact that they have moved in with each other from Mrs. Moon.  She makes such a mess of things that the only way she will leave is if Simon takes care of her, but Simon has left for California.  Meanwhile, Frasier's neighbor Cam drapes the American flag over his balcony, and Frasier cannot complain because it would seem unpatriotic.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E14 - Juvenilia
metas.description: Kenny tells Frasier and Roz that some recent research into KACL listeners shows that Frasier's average listener is an older gentleman who keeps the radio on for company. He suggests Frasier reach out to the youth.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E15 - The Proposal
metas.description: Niles plans on proposing to Daphne, so he prepares his speech; buys a ring; and hires a choir, a string quartet, a trumpet player and Wolfgang Puck.  But Daphne's mother is still staying with them, and on the night Niles plans to propose, Daphne begins to feel ill.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E16 - Wheels of Fortune
metas.description: Frasier is unimpressed when his scheming, scamming ex-brother-in-law rolls in for a visit -- now in a wheelchair -- and claims to be a reformed, God-fearing man who needs money for a revival ministry.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E17 - Three Blind Dates
metas.description: Niles sets Frasier up with Lisa, a patient who owns a bookstore, but they never run into each other.  Roz sets Frasier up with Suzanne, an artist, who ends up hating Frasier.  Martin sets Frasier up with Kris, an attractive girl from his building, who seems to know every man at the bar.  But Frasier later runs into and hits it off with Lisa.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E18 - War of the Words
metas.description: A-N-X-I-E-T-Y seizes Frasier at the National Spelling Bee, where his son Frederick is a leading competitor.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E19 - Deathtrap
metas.description: While Frasier and Niles uncover a human skull under the floor of their childhood home and let their imagination get the better of them, Roz's daughter's hamster has died and she is uncertain how to break it to her.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E20 - The Love You Fake
metas.description: To quell a feud between Frasier and an upstairs antagonist, Martin and the neighbor's mother feign a romance.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E21 - Cheerful Goodbyes
metas.description: Frasier returns to Boston to give a speech, and Niles, Daphne and Martin tag along to see the city. Once there, Frasier runs into Cliff Clavin.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E22 - Frasier Has Spokane
metas.description: Frasier's show has branched out to Spokane, and he goes to the station in Spokane to meet the press. He quickly finds out that the press and his callers refuse to warm up to him.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E23 - The Guilt Trippers
metas.description: Guilt feelings over a sexual liaison with Roz plague Frasier, who heads out to her family reunion in Wisconsin to make amends.

metas.name: Frasier - S9E24 - Moons Over Seattle
metas.description: Niles' persistence finally convinces Daphne's father to come to Seattle to reconcile with his wife. Daphne is disappointed that Niles didn't consult her first, but is on board with the plan.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E1 - The Ring Cycle
metas.description: After Daphne and Niles elope in Reno, they are forced to go through several fake ceremonies in not to upset friends and family who wanted to be at the wedding.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E2 - Enemy at the Gate
metas.description: Frasier drives Niles back from a shopping excursion. Just as they enter the parking garage, Frasier suddenly realizes that the clock in his car is incorrect and that he is going to be late for his show.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E3 - Proxy Prexy
metas.description: Frasier is desperate to finally win the presidency of the condo board after several unsuccessful attempts.  However, he admits that he has no chance because he has rubbed all of the board members the wrong way at one time or another.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E4 - Kissing Cousin
metas.description: Frasier is surprised to learn that Kenny has never unpacked the boxes in his office because he views all of his jobs as temporary.  Roz's younger cousin Jen comes to stay with her for the week.  She is extremely cynical and opinionated, and quickly gets on Frasier's nerves.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E5 - Tales from the Crypt
metas.description: Frasier is infuriated when Bulldog successfully pulls several practical jokes on him.  He vows to get revenge, and plots an elaborate prank that he takes way too seriously.  Martin and Roz predict that he will fail because he is terrible at carrying out pranks.  .

metas.name: Frasier - S10E6 - Star Mitzvah
metas.description: As Frasier prepares for Frederick's bar mitzvah, Noel offers to translate Frasier's speech into Hebrew in exchange for an autograph from a science fiction convention.  However, when Frasier doesn't keep his end of the bargain, Noel uses his wealth of Star Trek knowledge to take revenge.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E7 - Bristle While You Work (1)
metas.description: Niles becomes concerned about a lingering toothache after his dentist assures him that there is nothing wrong with the tooth.  He tells Roz that there is a chance that he may be suffering from referred pain; and that the pain could actually be a sign of a heart condition.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E8 - Rooms With a View (2)
metas.description: Niles prepares to undergo heart bypass surgery.  He is surprised to receive a call wishing him well from Maris, who had learned of his plight from a gossipy acquaintance.  Frasier tries to keep Roz and the family at ease by researching the procedure (as well as the doctors' backgrounds) and printing out detailed descriptions for everyone.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E9 - Don't Go Breaking My Heart (3)
metas.description: Niles recovers rapidly from his heart surgery and receives the go-ahead from doctors to resume normal activities, but seems reluctant to do this.  He maintains his strict post-operative diet, and refuses to exercise or share a bed with Daphne.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E10 - We Two Kings
metas.description: Frasier and Niles bicker over who gets to host the family Christmas celebration. When it seems that Martin will have to work, they decide to bring Christmas to him, with disastrous results. Meanwhile, Roz finds herself attracted to a hunky shopping mall Santa.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E11 - Door Jam
metas.description: Frasier mistakenly receives some of Cam Winston's mail, including a mysterious invitation to an exclusive locale.  Frasier and Niles are surprised to have been left out of the loop about this new hot spot, and become obsessed with finding out more information.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E12 - The Harassed
metas.description: Frasier is forced to give up ten minutes of his show for a new financial analysis segment. When the beautiful new stock market reporter's attitude rubs everyone the wrong way, Frasier misreads her signals, which lands everyone in a sexual harassment seminar.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E13 - Lilith Needs a Favor
metas.description: Lilith comes to Seattle, and tells Frasier that she would like to have another child.  She wants him to father the child through artificial insemination so that Frederick could have a full-sibling.  Frasier is hesitant to go along with this, so Lilith tries to manipulate him by bringing up touching stories from Frederick's childhood.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E14 - Daphne Does Dinner
metas.description: Niles and Frasier plan a party to celebrate the unveiling of a painting that Niles has just purchased.  However, Daphne notes that every event the brothers host inevitably ends in disaster.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E15 - Trophy Girlfriend
metas.description: Tired of being humiliated in his club's annual squash tournament, Niles ditches Frasier and pairs with a younger partner.  A P.E. teacher named Chelsea asks Frasier to team with her in the mixed doubles competition.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E16 - Fraternal Schwinns
metas.description: KACL organizes a bike-a-thon to raise money for AIDS research.  Frasier plans to just make a financial donation, but is goaded into participating after Julia announces her intention to take part.  Daphne suggests that she and Niles also enter the event.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E17 - Kenny on the Couch
metas.description: Kenny becomes extremely depressed after his divorce is finalized.  Frasier offers to refer him to another psychiatrist, but Kenny says that he would prefer to discuss his problems with Frasier.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E18 - Roe to Perdition
metas.description: Frasier and Niles become a big hit when, at a party, they serve beluga caviar they purchased on the black market. Meanwhile, Martin has a tough time returning $40 an ATM gave him in error.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E19 - Some Assembly Required
metas.description: Frasier's co-workers cajole him into helping them build a house for Habitat for Humanity.  Frasier mostly seems to get in the way, and his participation is limited to stirring paint and a little bit of sanding.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E20 - Farewell, Nervosa
metas.description: Frasier consults his old friend Avery for advice on his finances.  Avery says that Frasier's spending habits are out of control.  Frasier becomes depressed and heads out to Cafe Nervosa to think about a solution.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E21 - The Devil and Dr. Phil
metas.description: Frasier learns that Dr. Phil McGraw is in town for a special.  The two are old friends, but Frasier is angry at Phil for supposedly swindling him out of $200 in a poker game.  He reluctantly agrees to take the star-struck Roz to the set to see him.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E22 - Fathers and Sons
metas.description: Leland Barton, Hester's former research assistant, comes for a visit after a long absence from Seattle.  Roz becomes alarmed when Leland confesses his deep affection for Hester.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E23 - Analyzed Kiss
metas.description: Julia becomes extremely depressed after breaking up with Avery, who had never followed through on his promise to leave his wife for her.  He tries to deny her the credit for their software company, an endeavor for which she did most of the work.

metas.name: Frasier - S10E24 - A New Position for Roz
metas.description: Roz tries to train the woefully incompetent Noel as Frasier's new producer as she prepares to leave KACL.  She becomes increasingly melancholy about the possibility of leaving Frasier, and bristles upon learning of his new relationship with Julia.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E1 - No Sex, Please, We're Skittish
metas.description: Roz's return to KACL rattles Frasier, who's reinvolved with Julia; Niles' fatherhood plans get an unexpected setback he determines to remedy with an unorthodox virility enhancer.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E2 - A Man, a Plan and a Gal: Julia
metas.description: Love blinds Frasier to the faults of Julia, who behaves obnoxiously and insensitively at a Crane dinner gathering. For starters, she embarrasses Daphne, then winds up chattering incessantly on her cell phone.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E3 - The Doctor Is Out
metas.description: Frasier and Niles suspect that Roz's new boyfriend, Barry, is gay.  They see Barry on the street and believe that he has gone into a gay bar.  Frasier, worried that Barry is leading Roz on, goes inside to confront him.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E4 - The Babysitter
metas.description: A courtship makes rivals of Martin and Frasier, who are vying for the affections of the latter's former baby-sitter, now a lounge singer with a vivacious personality and a quick wit that's appealing to both Crane senior and junior.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E5 - The Placeholder
metas.description: Roz tries to convince Frasier to go out with her friend Ann.  She feels that Frasier is too particular about who he dates, and adds that there is nothing wrong with continuing to date around until the right person comes along.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E6 - I'm Listening
metas.description: Frasier overhears Ronee making a date with another man.  He tells Martin, who is furious at him for eavesdropping.  Ronee later breaks the news to Martin herself, explaining that she didn't think they had an exclusive relationship.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E7 - Maris Returns (1)
metas.description: Niles receives a phone call from a panicked Maris, who asks to meet him for lunch.  She asks for advice on how to handle her violent, philandering lover.  Niles recommends that she leave him immediately.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E8 - Murder Most Maris (2)
metas.description: Niles is questioned by the police because he loaned Maris the murder weapon--an antique crossbow--for use in a play.  Maris insists that she acted in self-defense.  She continually calls Niles from jail, leaving Daphne extremely angry.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E9 - Guns N' Neuroses
metas.description: Lilith comes to town for a one-day conference.  She and Frasier try to get together, but keep having to cancel.  Lilith discusses her romantic problems with a colleague at Cafe Nervosa before having to return to the conference.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E10 - Seabee Jeebies
metas.description: Niles gains notoriety throughout Seattle because of his involvement in Maris's murder case.  He and Daphne mingle with the city's social elite (including Bill Gates), and he is able to finagle reservations at booked restaurants.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E11 - High Holidays
metas.description: Frasier is shocked when Frederick comes to visit sporting his new 'goth' look.  Meanwhile, realising that he never rebelled in his adolescence, Niles decides to try marijuana...with unexpected results.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E12 - Frasier-Lite
metas.description: Weight loss challenges KACL, enrolled in a pound-shedding contest that pits Frasier against a taunting nemesis who bullied him in high school.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E13 - The Ann Who Came To Dinner
metas.description: Lawsuit fears plague Frasier over an accident in his kitchen that befell his insurer: a former date named Ann he snubbed. Now, Frasier entreats her to recuperate at his place, where Ann takes full advantage of the situation.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E14 - Freudian Sleep
metas.description: Strange dreams dominate this episode, which finds Frasier wed to Daphne, now a vociferous eater; Niles a carefree philanderer, dallying with bikini-clad repairwomen; and Martin a dashing hoofer, performing with Ronee.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E15 - Caught in the Act
metas.description: Roz is disappointed when she is unable to get Alice tickets to a concert by children's performer Nanny G.  After his family reveals that he used to be married to her, Frasier agrees to help Roz secure tickets.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E16 - Boo!
metas.description: A practical joke backfires, giving Martin a 'mild cardiac event' that he's anxious to keep secret from Ronee, fearing that she'll think he's become 'some feeble old guy'.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E17 - Coots and Ladders
metas.description: Guilty feelings seize Frasier, who, just for a thrill, swipes a medallion from his neighbor, a chatty, trusting widow. Now he sets out to secretly return the object, with the reluctant help of Niles.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E18 - Match Game
metas.description: Lovelorn Frasier engages a matchmaker, who mismatches him with dinner dates that turn disastrous; well-meaning Niles hires a kooky helpmate for Daphne's delivery who works with a shaman ...and a drummer.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E19 - Miss Right Now
metas.description: Martin worries about a visit from Ronee's mother.  She dislikes him because she once saw Martin innocently comforting the teenage Ronee and assumed he was trying to 'take her virtue'.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E20 - And Frasier Makes Three
metas.description: Courting unnerves Frasier, whose wooing of a winsome matchmaker is constantly interrupted by her disarming beau, a dedicated environmentalist who's also quite cosmopolitan.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E21 - Detour
metas.description: Country ways test Frasier and Charlotte, who're stranded at a farmhouse with a very odd family that has no idea who he is. Back home, a physical therapist is mistaken for a stripper in a situation that greatly embarrasses Niles.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E22 - Crock Tales
metas.description: As Frasier prepares for a dinner party, he considers throwing away an old broken crock pot.  However, the crock pot stirs many memories of past experiences with his friends and family.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E23 - Goodnight, Seattle (1)
metas.description: During an especially bumpy flight Frasier tells a fellow passenger about his eventful past few weeks which are recounted in a long flashback. Bebe tells Frasier that he has been offered the chance to replace a recently deceased San Francisco radio host.

metas.name: Frasier - S11E24 - Goodnight, Seattle (2)
metas.description: Daphne gives birth to a healthy son David. Frasier marries Martin and Ronee in the vet's office before Daphne and the baby leave for the hospital. Frasier grows very lonely with Martin out of the apartment and Daphne and Niles busy with their son.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E1 - I Said Bitch
metas.description: Jordan Peele and Keegan-Michael Key attempt to say a forbidden word in regards to their women, Lil Wayne adjusts to life behind bars, and President Obama expresses how he really feels - with the help of his anger translator.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E2 - Black Hawk Up
metas.description: President Obama rap battles, and a traffic reporter has some trouble flying.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E3 - Das Negros
metas.description: Jordan and Keegan are masters of disguise in Nazi Germany, and two slaves are accused of bigotry.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E4 - The Branding
metas.description: Luther, President Obama's anger translator, reminds everyone who killed Osama bin Laden.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E5 - Gay Marriage Legalized
metas.description: Commitment looms for Jordan and Keegan after gay marriage is finally legalized.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E6 - Flash Mob
metas.description: Jordan and Keegan engage in an epic flicker match, and a flash mob goes terribly wrong.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E7 - Bobby McFerrin vs. Michael Winslow
metas.description: Jordan and Keegan debate who is blacker, and Bobby McFerrin duels Michael Winslow.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S1E8 - Babysitting Forest Whitaker
metas.description: President Obama doesn't get special treatment, and a young Forest Whitaker terrifies his babysitter.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E1 - Obama College Years
metas.description: A young Barack Obama discovers how inspirational a party can be, and two hitmen get sidetracked.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E2 - Dubstep
metas.description: Two friends encounter a racist dog in the park, the flamboyant players of the East/West Collegiate Bowl introduce themselves and a dubstep track derails moving day.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E3 - Puppy Dog Ice-T
metas.description: A rescue dog displays a troubling attitude, and Luther provides presidential debate zingers.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E4 - I'm Retired
metas.description: A biracial boy has penis concerns, and an inner-city substitute teacher takes roll call.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E5 - Bone Thugs-n-Homeless
metas.description: Why are there no more rap groups? Keegan and Jordan have an answer.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E6 - Michael Jackson Halloween
metas.description: Noah really gets into his Halloween costume, and white zombies attack.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E7 - Victory
metas.description: Luther informs Mitt Romney who won the election, and a non-stop party refuses to stop.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E8 - Manly Tears
metas.description: A tough guy cries in front of his crew, and substitute teacher Mr. Nostrand does not play.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E9 - Gangsta Standoff
metas.description: Two gang rivals get inside each other's heads, and a police officer hones his act.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S2E10 - Dueling Hats
metas.description: One man's bikini-clad woman is another man's mystery, and two friends step up their hat game.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E1 - Les Mis
metas.description: A woman confronts her husband on his web surfing habits, a rapper grapples with his hyperactive hype man, and the villain of an epic musical can't get a word in.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E2 - East/West Bowl Rap
metas.description: Two women prepare to fight outside a club, and the Valets wonder why people mess with the Batmans.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E3 - Slap-Ass
metas.description: Two slaves try to find a way out of fighting to the death, and a member of a Latin gang proves his toughness.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E4 - Boarding Group One
metas.description: A passenger finds out that he's far from the first to board, and some breakdancers keep it nooice.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E5 - Obama Shutdown
metas.description: The Obamas get intimate, the founding fathers talk gun control, and Metta World Peace makes a wish.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E6 - Cunnilingus Class
metas.description: Homies learn how to pleasure a lady, and MVP Ozamataz Buckshank rocks a post-game interview.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E7 - Sexy Vampires
metas.description: A hotel guest is blown away by the Continental breakfast, and a psycho's victims stay positive.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E8 - High on Potenuse
metas.description: A guy learns how to buy drugs in public, and an executive tests a speech for political correctness.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E9 - Tackle & Grapple
metas.description: Meegan gets Andre in trouble, and sensei Doug Duggart teaches self-defense for the ladies.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E10 - Black Ice
metas.description: Local news anchors warn viewers about the dangers of "black ice," Lando Calrissian deals with an admirer, and Metta World Peace gives tips to homemakers.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E11 - The Power of Wings
metas.description: A pawn shop customer asks after some suspicious items, Wendell makes a vanity video, and Karim and Jahar go to the gym.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E12 - East/West Bowl 2
metas.description: The players in the 2013 East/West Bowl introduce themselves, a suspect landlord searches a tenant's apartment, and Metta World Peace explores his physical limitations.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S3E13 - Pussy on the Chainwax
metas.description: Some friends argue over whether a new slang phrase is a "thing," a man learns the truth about his father's Hollywood past, and the valets come to Anne Hathaway's defense.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E1 - Alien Imposters
metas.description: The survivors of an alien invasion find out whom they can trust, a family comes to terms with a relative's gay wedding, a couple of racists express some surprising views, a drill sergeant sings an unconventional marching song, and a pop sensation answers questions from her fans.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E2 - Parole Officer Puppet
metas.description: A parole officer uses a puppet to connect with convicts, a man in a neck brace attempts to party down, a Nazi officer tells the story of the time he saw Hitler, and Levi goes steampunk.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E3 - Georgina and Esther and Satan
metas.description: Two old women battle with Satan, things go awry when a man goes mattress shopping, and dance club patrons are forced to face the truth about themselves.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E4 - Slap-Ass: In Recovery
metas.description: A mobster seeking vengeance on someone who wronged him, a baseball player fighting an addiction to unwanted bodily contact, and Family Matters' Steve Urkel driving a man insane.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E5 - Quarterback Concussion
metas.description: A concussed football player cheering his team on, a man accusing his wife of being unfaithful, and a restaurateur scaring away his customers.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E6 - Scariest Movie Ever
metas.description: Sketches include a vampire revealing himself, the thwarting of a serial killer, and a child getting his wish.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E7 - Sex Detective
metas.description: A detective puts himself in the mind of a perpetrator, a retro action hero infiltrates a villain's compound, and President Obama addresses the critics within his party.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E8 - Terrible Henchman
metas.description: A henchman keeps interrupting his boss's torture session, a speaker at a school assembly discusses his colorful life, and a man tries to prove he's all grown up.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E9 - Aerobics Meltdown
metas.description: Sketches include Stan Lee pitching new superheroes, a man losing his street cred, and a man creating a mnemonic device to remember a parking spot.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E10 - Sex Addict Wendell
metas.description: Wendell attends a support group for sex addicts, a teacher has trouble calming down a class clown, and two jazz musicians have a scat battle.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S4E11 - Terrorist Meeting
metas.description: A group of terrorists decries the TSA, Carlito tries to prove he's the loco-est member of his gang, and Meegan has trouble finding her seat at a movie theater.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E1 - Y'all Ready For This?
metas.description: Season 5 premiere sketches include a football team getting psyched up before a game; President Obama and Luther meeting Hillary Clinton; two men discussing potential threats on a flight; a band of pirates singing a chantey. Also: a trigger-happy cop.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E2 - Airplane Showdown
metas.description: An airline passenger has a standoff with a flight attendant, Shaboots and T-Ray deliver a lecture on women's periods, and a prayer group receives a visit from God.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E3 - A Cappella Club
metas.description: Two black students compete for a cappella supremacy, Andre and Meegan go on their first date, and would-be terrorists get caught up in the food truck business.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E4 - Severed Head Showcase
metas.description: A gospel group must practice without its coach, a group of warriors celebrate a beheading, a prisoner tries to trick his guard, a young man is confronted for only speaking in catchphrases.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E5 - Killer Concept Album
metas.description: A politician denies sending lewd photos; a detective interrogates a rapper; Cedric and Levi find lightning in a bottle; two Southern gentlemen compliment women; Jordan runs into an old friend; a cop takes things literally.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E6 - The Job Interview
metas.description: Judge Jessie has a new show; a man waits for his job interview; two ladies catch up over drinks; the valets discuss Val Kilmer; a retired military specialist is briefed on a new project; a woman introduces her fiancé to her parents.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E7 - MC Mom
metas.description: A gangster participates in a drive-by; a mom writes a song for her son; two scam artists compete with each other; an “Undercover Boss” reveals himself; Big Boi runs into André 3000; two guys get into a car accident.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E8 - Hollywood Sequel Doctor
metas.description: A tickle game between two friends gets a little strange; brainstorming for "Gremlins 2"; a man deals with an unruly office janitor; two thugs suspect their friend snitched; Keegan and Jordan discuss Africa at a party.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E9 - The 420 Special
metas.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson relaxes at home; Keegan endures a job interview; a tailor has a gassy client; the valets discuss "Game of Thrones"; a new strategy for telemarketing.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E10 - Meegan & Andre Break Up
metas.description: Two friends get into an argument at a club; Meegan and André talk about their relationship; a rapper walks out of an interview; Conrad flies business select; Keegan has a new mustache.

metas.name: Key & Peele - S5E11 - The End
metas.description: Ray Parker Jr. has some new songs; a man can't stop saying "deez nuts"; Keegan has to call 911; a young man learns about Negrotown.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E1 - Yesterday's Jam
metas.description: It's Jen's first day at Reynholm Industries and she is assigned the position of manager of the IT department. Roy and Moss quickly find out that she has absolutely no knowledge of computers whatsoever.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E2 - Calamity Jen
metas.description: Denholm tries to reduce stress in the work place and invites a stress expert to give the employees a class about dealing with stress. Meanwhile, Jen buys new shoes that are a few sizes too small, which leads to a very painful result.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E3 - Fifty-Fifty
metas.description: Moss and Roy go on a lonely hearts website. Meanwhile Jen meets the man of her dreams.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E4 - The Red Door
metas.description: What lies behind the mysterious red door in the IT department? What has happened to Moss's new mug? And why is Roy in danger of becoming known as a 'desk rabbit'?

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E5 - The Haunting of Bill Crouse
metas.description: When her date Bill turns out to be a jerk, Jen asks Moss to send him away if he stops by. When he does and Moss can't convince him to leave, Moss has to lie and ends up telling Bill that Jen is dead.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S1E6 - Aunt Irma Visits
metas.description: Roy and Moss get the same symptoms as Jen when it's her time of the month.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E1 - The Work Outing
metas.description: Jen is asked out on a date by Philip, and Roy and Moss decide to tag along, which ruins any chance of romance Jen was hoping for.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E2 - Return of the Golden Child
metas.description: Moss uses a website to calculate Roy's time of death, but Roy doesn't want to know. Nevertheless Moss spills it anyway, making Roy very nervous. Meanwhile, Denholm's death means trouble for Jen, Roy and Moss, until support appears in the form of a mysterious, albeit libidinous, stranger.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E3 - Moss and the German
metas.description: Moss decides to sign himself up for a German cookery course, but due to a slight miscommunication between Moss and the advertiser, it turns out to be something else entirely.  Roy tries to see a film before someone can spoil the ending for him.  Jen finds out smoking is not as glamorous as she used to think.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E4 - The Dinner Party
metas.description: Jen's attempt to throw a successful dinner party don't go exactly the way she was hoping. The evening isn't a total disaster for everyone, though, as Richmond meets the woman of his dreams.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E5 - Smoke and Mirrors
metas.description: When Jen complains about her bad bra, Moss attempts to create the world's most perfect bra. When he succeeds, he attempts to get onto the BBC show Dragon's Den to demonstrate it, which turns out a bit awkward.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S2E6 - Men Without Women
metas.description: After making several unsuccessful advances, Douglas offers Jen the job as his new PA in order to get even closer to her. This way he hopes to slip a potion in her tea, that he obtained from a sorcerer and which should make Douglas irresistable to Jen.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E1 - From Hell
metas.description: Douglas's neglegance in running the company nearly ruins Reynholm Industries. Meanwhile, Jen has a builder over at her house to do some renovations. When Roy seems to remember the guy from being on a TV show "Builders from hell", Jen gets a bit nervous.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E2 - Are We Not Men?
metas.description: Roy and Moss try to meet new friends by getting familiar with the latest football news and slang. They meet new, yet peculiar friends. Meanwhile, Jen dates a guy who looks like a magician.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E3 - Tramps Like Us
metas.description: When a sexual harassment case ends with a low pay out, Jen, Roy and Moss find themselves all moving in different directions.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E4 - The Speech
metas.description: Jen makes enemies of Roy and Moss after trying to assert herself more after being named as Employee of the Month. Douglas discovers that the woman who he loves is not quite as she seems.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E5 - Friendface
metas.description: The boys are introduced to a social networking website by Jen.  Through the site they get in touch with old acquaintances to which they brag a little bit too much, which leads to awkward situations.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S3E6 - Calendar Geeks
metas.description: To raise money for charity, the girls of the 7th floor come up with the idea to do a nude calendar. Roy -who happens to be there to fix a computer- gets excited when the girls ask him to do the photography. Jen doesn't like the idea so much and comes up with an alternative.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E1 - Jen the Fredo
metas.description: Jen decides she wants to stretch herself more at work and applies for the post of Entertainment Manager. After discovering that her boss Douglas's business connections have wilder tastes than she planned for, she ends up turning to Moss and Roy for help.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E2 - The Final Countdown
metas.description: Moss ends up becoming a celebrity after he beats all the records on a popular daytime quiz show. Roy tries to explain to an old mate after being mistaken for a window cleaner. Jen finds herself pre-occupied with Douglas' secret head of department meetings.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E3 - Something Happened
metas.description: Douglas finds himself becoming a Spaceologist. Some bad luck changes Roy's life. Jen ends up getting involved with a rock band.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E4 - Italian for Beginners
metas.description: Roy gets obsessed by his latest girlfriend's sad family history, while Jen tells an absolute whopper to get some attention.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E5 - Bad Boys
metas.description: When Roy and Moss become juvenile delinquents for the day they end up having an uncomfortable experience at a local shopping centre.

metas.name: The IT Crowd - S4E6 - Reynholm vs Reynholm
metas.description: Douglas discovers that marriage agrees with him for all of a fortnight. He then finds himself in court defending himself with Jen, Roy and Moss' help.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S1E1 - Matthew Priest, Bruce Dickinson, Richard Fairbrass, Donna McPhail
metas.description: The first of a new six-part comedy pop-quiz series. Mark Lamarr poses the questions for teams captained by comedians Sean Hughes and Phill Jupitus. Tonight's panellists are Matthew Priest of Dodgy, former Iron Maiden lead singer Bruce Dickinson and Right Said Fred's Richard Fairbrass, while the guest comedian is Donna McPhail.
