(Unaired episode during series 22 initial run)

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E1 - James Corden, Paloma Faith, Tom Clarke, Ben Miller & Janeane Garofalo
metas.description: The anarchic, award-winning pop quiz returns with team captain Noel Fielding opposite regular Phill Jupitus and guest host James Corden. Guest panellists include Tom Clarke, Paloma Faith, Ben Miller and American comedienne Janeane Garofalo.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E2 - Rhod Gilbert, Greg Davies, Martin Kemp, Gabby Logan, Jeremy Reynolds
metas.description: Regular team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Rhod Gilbert and panellists Greg Davies, Martin Kemp, Gabby Logan and Jeremy Reynolds.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E3 - Alex James, Peter Serafinowicz, Holly Walsh, Jessica Origliasso, Newton Faulkner
metas.description: Anarchic, award-winning pop quiz. Regular team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Alex James from Blur and panellists Peter Serafinowicz, stand-up comic Holly Walsh and Jessica Origliasso from The Veronicas.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E4 - Jack Whitehall, Stephen Mangan, Rochelle Wiseman, Mr Hudson, Andrea McLean
metas.description: Anarchic, award-winning pop quiz. Regular team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Jack Whitehall and panellists musician Mr Hudson, Rochelle Wiseman from The Saturdays, Loose Women's Andrea McLean and actor Stephen Mangan.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E5 - Frank Skinner, Calvin Harris, Jon Richardson, Fearne Cotton, Tinchy Stryder
metas.description: Regular team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Frank Skinner plus dance superstar Calvin Harris, comedian Jon Richardson, presenter Fearne Cotton and UK hip hop star Tinchy Stryder.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E6 - Claudia Winkleman, Harry Shearer, Little Boots, Jamelia, Tom Basden
metas.description: Claudia Winkleman hosts the quiz with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding and guests Harry Shearer, Little Boots, Jamelia and Tom Basden.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E7 - Mark Watson, Tim Minchin, Donal MacIntyre, Daniel Merriweather, Shingai Shoniwa
metas.description: The show is hosted by Mark Watson, with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding. Guests include comedian Tim Minchin, investigative journalist Donal MacIntyre, musician Daniel Merriweather and lead singer of The Noisettes, Shingai Shoniwa.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E8 - Martin Freeman, Martha Wainwright, Charlie Brooker, Simon Bird, Dappy
metas.description: The show is hosted by actor Martin Freeman, with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding. Guests include singer/songwriter Martha Wainwright, Screenwipe's Charlie Brooker and star of The Inbetweeners, Simon Bird, and there's the triumphant return of Dappy from N-Dubz.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E9 - David Walliams, Andy Serkis, Gareth Malone, Basshunter, Josie Long
metas.description: Little Britain's David Walliams hosts, with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding. Guests include Lord of the Rings star Andy Serkis, Gareth Malone from BBC Two's The Choir, Swedish pop star Basshunter and comedian Josie Long.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E10 - Dermot O'Leary, Michael Ball, David O'Doherty, Russell Tovey, Aston Merrygold
metas.description: Presiding over team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding is The X Factor's Dermot O'Leary. The guests are star of stage and screen Michael Ball, Irish comedian David O'Doherty, History Boys and Being Human star Russell Tovey and, from JLS, Aston Merrygold.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E11 - Frankie Boyle, Carol Vorderman, DJ Ironik, Jon McClure, Richard Herring
metas.description: Presiding over team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding is host Frankie Boyle, and guests include former Countdown co-host Carol Vorderman, British rap star DJ Ironik, Jon McClure of Reverend and the Makers, and comedian Richard Herring.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E12 - The Doctor Who Special
metas.description: David Tennant hosts a special Dr Who-themed show with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding. Guests include Dr Who stars Bernard Cribbins and Catherine Tate, plus platinum-selling jazz artist Jamie Cullum and Radio 1's Jo Whiley.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S23E13 - Where Are They Now?
metas.description: Hilarious highlights and outtakes from the latest series, plus a chance to see how some of the guest hosts' lives were changed forever by presenting one of the nation's best-loved pop quizzes. Featuring Frankie Boyle, David Tennant, Alex James, Claudia Winkleman, James Corden, Mark Watson and many more.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E1 - Mark Ronson, Alesha Dixon, Mollie King, Paul Foot, Tinie Tempah
metas.description: The music based panel show returns for its 24th series. Musician and producer Mark Ronson hosts.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E2 - Catherine Tate, Tulisa Contostavlos, Howard Marks, Badly Drawn Boy, Katy Wix
metas.description: The anarchic, award-winning pop quiz returns with team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus. Guest presenter is Catherine Tate, with guests Howard Marks, Badly Drawn Boy, Katy Wix and Tulisa Contostavlos.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E3 - Jack Dee, Charlie Higson, Eliza Doolittle, Jedward, Katy Brand
metas.description: Guest presenter is comedian Jack Dee, with guests singer Eliza Doolittle, author Charlie Higson, comedian Katy Brand and X Factor twins Jedward.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E4 - Terry Wogan, Edith Bowman, Rufus Hound, James Blunt, Imelda May
metas.description: Anarchic pop quiz hosted by Terry Wogan with team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus. Guests are: Edith Bowman, Rufus Hound, James Blunt and Imelda May.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E5 - David O'Doherty, Mel B, Olly Murs, Peter Jones, Joe Wilkinson
metas.description: Anarchic pop quiz. Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest presenter David O'Doherty, and panellists Mel B, Olly Murs, Peter Jones and Joe Wilkinson.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E6 - Tim Minchin, Paloma Faith, Jason Donovan, Tim Key, DJ Target
metas.description: Anarchic, award-winning pop quiz. Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest presenter Tim Minchin, and panellists Paloma Faith, Jason Donovan, Tim Key and DJ Target.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E7 - Tim Westwood, JLS, Holly Walsh, Russell Watson, Wiley
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest presenter Tim Westwood and panellists JLS, Holly Walsh, Russell Watson and Wiley.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E8 - Lee Mack, Jon Richardson, Diana Vickers, Andrew Stone, Irwin Sparkes
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest presenter Lee Mack plus guest panellists Irwin Sparkes, Diana Vickers, Jon Richardson and Andrew Stone.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E9 - Juliette Lewis, Theo Hutchcraft, Nick Grimshaw, Kimberly Wyatt, Vic Reeves
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Juliette Lewis plus guest panellists Theo Hutchcraft, Nick Grimshaw, Kimberly Wyatt and Vic Reeves.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E10 - Josh Groban, Charlie Baker, Tinchy Stryder, KT Tunstall, Michael Ball
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest presenter Josh Groban and panellists Charlie Baker, Tinchy Stryder, KT Tunstall and Michael Ball.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E11 - Robert Webb, Cee Lo Green, Chris Packham, Example, Andi Osho
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Robert Webb plus guest panellists Cee Lo Green, Chris Packham, Example and Andi Osho.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E12 - Frankie Boyle, Miles Jupp, Goldie, Professor Green, Michelle Williams
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host Frankie Boyle plus guest panellists Michelle Williams, Goldie, Professor Green and Miles Jupp.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S24E13 - Best of Series 24
metas.description: Pop Quiz host David O'Doherty presents a compilation of the best bits from this series of Never Mind the Buzzcocks. Join him as he reunites all of the guest hosts for a star-studded evening of entertainment.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E1 - David Hasselhoff, Amelle Berrabah, Peter Serafinowicz, Louie Spence, Loick Essien
metas.description: In the first show of the new series, David Hasselhoff is the Guest Chairman, presiding over team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding, who are joined by Louie Spence, Sugababe Amelle, Loick Essien and Peter Serafinowicz.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E2 - Jack Dee, Spencer Matthews, Alex James, Maverick Sabre, Seann Walsh
metas.description: The second in the 25th anniversary series, with team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus. Host this week is Jack Dee and guests are Spencer Matthews, Alex James, Maverick Sabre and Seann Walsh.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E3 - Lorraine Kelly, Jarred Christmas, Professor Green, Stacey Solomon, Tony Law
metas.description: The third in the 25th series, with team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus. Hosting this week is Lorraine Kelly and guests are Jarred Christmas, Professor Green, Stacey Solomon and Tony Law.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E4 - Adam Buxton, Reggie Yates, Margaret Cho, Beverley Knight, Dynamo
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus and guest host Adam Buxton are joined by Radio 1 DJ Reggie Yates, American stand-up Margaret Cho, magician Dynamo, and soul singer Beverley Knight.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E5 - Will Young, Mark Watson, Sinitta, Paul Foot, DJ Toddla T
metas.description: Will Young will be in the host chair for this brand new episode of Never Mind The Buzzcocks along with captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus. They'll be joined by X Factor's Sinitta, comedians Mark Watson and Paul Foot as well as cool DJ Toddla T.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E6 - Greg Davies, Amy Childs, Frankie Boyle, Ian 'H' Watkins, Tinchy Stryder, Holly Walsh
metas.description: Anarchic music quiz. Greg Davies hosts, with captains Frankie Boyle and Noel Fielding plus The Only Way is Essex star Amy Childs, Tinchy Stryder, Ian 'H' Watkins and comedian Holly Walsh.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E7 - Alice Cooper, Rufus Hound, Wretch 32, Olly Murs, Penny Smith
metas.description: Guest host Alice Cooper is joined by guest panellists Olly Murs, Wretch 32, Rufus Hound and Penny Smith.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E8 - James Blunt, Harry Judd, Matthew Crosby, Sean Paul, Sarah Millican
metas.description: Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by guest host James Blunt and panellists Harry Judd from Strictly, Sarah Millican, Sean Paul and Matt Crosby.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E9 - Tinie Tempah, Pixie Lott, Example, Chris Ramsey, Joey Page
metas.description: Tinie Tempah guest hosts. Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by Pixie Lott, Example, Chris Ramsey and Joey Page.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E10 - Cilla Black, Holly Willoughby, Tiffany Stevenson, Rizzle Kicks, Angelos Epithemiou
metas.description: Cilla Black hosts with guests Holly Willoughby, Rizzle Kicks, Angelos Epithemiou (Renton Skinner) and Tiffany Stevenson.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E11 - Rhod Gilbert, Jimmy Osmond, Tom Parker, Caroline Flack, Charlie Baker
metas.description: Rhod Gilbert hosts with team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding, and guests Jimmy Osmond, Tom Parker from The Wanted, Caroline Flack and Charlie Baker.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E12 - John Barrowman, Jason Derulo, Joe Wilkinson, Jason Manford, Helen Skelton
metas.description: Christmas Never Mind the Buzzcocks, with guest host John Barrowman alongside Jason Derulo, Joe Wilkinson, Jason Manford, Helen Skelton, Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S25E13 - Series Highlights
metas.description: The best from the latest series, featuring Alice Cooper, Lorraine Kelly, James Blunt, Tinie Tempah, Cilla Black and more.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E1 - Kathy Burke, Fazer, Sarah Millican, Greg Rutherford, and Mark Hoppus
metas.description: In the first show of the series, team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding are joined by Olympian Greg Rutherford, N-Dubz's Fazer, comedienne Sarah Millican and Mark Hoppus of Blink-182 with guest host Kathy Burke.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E2 - Example, Gareth Malone, Wretch 32, Lianne La Havas, Rufus Hound
metas.description: Team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding are joined on the anarchic music quiz by choir master Gareth Malone and rapper Wretch 32, all under the watchful eye of guest host Example.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E3 - Jack Whitehall, Mena Suvari, Danny from McFly, Celia Pacquola, and Paul Foot
metas.description: Joining Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus on Buzzcocks is comedian Jack Whitehall, who takes over hosting duties. American Pie actress Mena Suvari and Danny from McFly also pop in for some pop quiz comedy capers.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E4 - Nick Grimshaw, Joe Lycett, Fred Macpherson, Conor Maynard, and Nancy Dell'Olio
metas.description: Having taken over hosting duties on the Radio One Breakfast Show, Nick Grimshaw does the same on the anarchic music quiz. Team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by singer Conor Maynard.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E5 - Lee Mack, Joe Wilkinson, Amy Macdonald, Lemar, Professor Green, and Chris Ramsey
metas.description: Comedian Lee Mack steps up to the comedy pop quiz plate for Buzzcocks hosting duties, and with Noel Fielding away, his team captains are Professor Green and Phill Jupitus.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E6 - Ne-Yo, Delilah, Aiden Grimshaw, Stacey Solomon, David O'Doherty
metas.description: R&B superstar Ne-Yo takes control of the show this week. Joining team captains Noel and Phill are Stacey Solomon, David O'Doherty, Aiden Grimshaw and Mercury Prize nominee Delilah.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E7 - Richard Ayoade, Ed Sheeran, Caroline Flack, Matthew Crosby, and Shingai Shoniwa
metas.description: The IT Crowd star Richard Ayoade hosts the pop quiz. Ed Sheeran, Caroline Flack, Matthew Crosby and Noisettes singer Shingai Shoniwa also join the team for some pop-quiz antics.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E8 - Richard Madeley, Heidi Range, Maverick Sabre, Seann Walsh
metas.description: Richard Madeley joins team captains Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus as the guest host. On the panel are Sugababe Heidi Range, Maverick Sabre, and comedian Seann Walsh.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E9 - Alex Horne, Louis Smith, Paloma Faith, Josh Widdicombe, and Tony Law
metas.description: Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by host, musical comedian Alex Horne and his band. Olympian and Strictly star Louis Smith and Paloma Faith also join in the comedy pop quiz capers alongside comedians Josh Widdicombe and Tony Law.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E10 - Stephen Mangan, Kayvan Novak, Michelle Heaton
metas.description: Actor Stephen Mangan takes over hosting duties this week. Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus are joined by Kayvan Novak and Michelle Heaton.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E11 - Liza Tarbuck, Rita Ora, Labrinth, Jameela Jamil, and Jason Manford
metas.description: Liza Tarbuck hosts this edition. Joining Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus on the teams are pop superstars Rita Ora and Labrinth, Jameela Jamil and comedian Jason Manford.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E12 - Touching People
metas.description: Buzzcocks takes a look back at some of the highlights of the series where Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus have been joined by hosts including Lee Mack, Kathy Burke, Richard Ayoade, Nick Grimshaw, Ne-Yo, Example and Jack Whitehall.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S26E13 - Christmas Special - Bob Mortimer, Mel C, DJ Fresh, Russell Tovey, Joey Page
metas.description: Bob Mortimer hosts this Christmassy edition. Joining Noel Fielding and Phill Jupitus on the teams are Spice Girl Melanie C, DJ Fresh, actor Russell Tovey, and comedian Joey Page.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S27E1 - John Hannah, Basement Jaxx, AlunaGeorge, James Acaster
metas.description: The comedy music quiz returns, with a guest host taking charge of proceedings. Regular team captains Phill Jupitus and Noel Fielding are joined on the first show by electronic duos Basement Jaxx and AlunaGeorge, and comedian James Acaster.

metas.name: Never Mind the Buzzcocks - S27E2 - Russell Howard, Conor Maynard, Lethal Bizzle, Isy Suttie

metas.description: Krishnan Guru-Murthy takes a look back at the best bits of this series of Never Mind The Buzzcocks whilst investigating the ludicrous claim that there was a missing episode of the pop quiz, and whether Phill and Noel are part of the cover up. Guest hosts include Dizzee Rascal, Warwick Davis, Jack Whitehall, Russell Howard, Peter Andre, Kristen Schaal, Michael Bolton and Rizzle Kicks.

metas.name: QI - S6E1 - Families (Children in Need Special)
metas.description: Guests Terry Wogan, David Mitchell and Ronni Ancona join regular contributor Alan Davies and host Stephen Fry in a special edition of the quiz show for Children in Need. The first episode introduces the theme for the series, which is topics beginning with the letter F, and includes the subject of family. As usual the questions are so difficult that points are awarded for the most interesting answers.

metas.name: QI - S15E1 - Ologies
metas.description: In the first episode of the 'O' series, Sandi Toksvig sets out in search of 'Ologies' and 'Odoxies' - and finds out how an amusement arcade helped to win the Cold War, meets a lizard with three eyes, and much else besides. The guests are Bill Bailey, Phill Jupitus, Claudia Winkleman and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S15E8 - Operations

metas.description: Sandi Toksvig goes a-wooing with Rosie Jones, Larry Dean, Maisie Adam and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S23E7 - Who What Why?
metas.description: Sandi Toksvig wonders who, what and why with Daliso Chaponda, Susan Calman, Cariad Lloyd and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S23E8 - Weird and Wonderful
metas.description: Sandi Toksvig has a weird and wonderful episode of QI featuring Melanie Bracewell, Patrick Kielty, Roisin Conaty and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S23E9 - Winter Wonderland
metas.description: Julian Clary, Fatiha El-Ghorri, Jimmy Carr and Alan Davies visit Sandi Toksvig's winter wonderland for the QI Christmas special.

metas.name: QI - S23E10 - ‘W’ Animals
metas.description: Sandi Toksvig looks at animals which start with a W with Nabil Abdulrashid, Holly Walsh, Sam Campbell and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S23E11 - Wet and Windy
metas.description: Chris McCausland, Zoe Lyons, Ed Byrne and Alan Davies join Sandi Toksvig for a wet and windy episode of QI.

metas.name: QI - S23E12 - Willy Nilly
metas.description: QI goes willy-nilly through the letter W as Sandi and Alan are joined by Josh Widdicombe, Catherine Bohart and Russell Kane.

metas.name: QI - S23E13 - Wordmongery
metas.description: Michael Odewale, Cally Beaton and Gyles Brandreth join Sandi and Alan for a bit of QI wordmongery.

metas.name: QI - S23E14 - Whatnots
metas.description: What’s not to like about Sandi Toksvig’s look at a welter of QI 'whatnots' With Sally Phillips, Andrew Maxwell, Joanne McNally and Alan Davies.

metas.name: QI - S23E15 - VG: Part 1
metas.description: A selection of the best moments from the W series of QI, hosted by Sandi Toksvig with Alan Davies and their guests.

metas.name: QI - S23E16 - VG: Part 2
metas.description: More of the best moments from the W series of QI, hosted by Sandi Toksvig with Alan Davies and their guests.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E1 - Gluten Free
metas.description: In the very first episode of Taskmaster NZ we watch Brynley Stent touch bread and regret it instantly. Guy Williams debates whether or not a cocktail is a cocktail without alcohol and we find out who makes the best sculpture.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E2 - A Political Hotcake
metas.description: We find out which comedian is the most musically talented, we watch Guy Williams put the crew in danger and we find out who can draw the best map of New Zealand... using a breakfast spread.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E3 - D.A.P.
metas.description: Our Taskmaster plays charades, Angella Dravid makes Paul Williams very uncomfortable, and it's the first team task of the series.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E4 - I'm Queer, I'm Here
metas.description: Our comedians are put behind the camera for a hilarious team task, Leigh Hart struggles to work a blender, and Brynley Stent's true feelings come out.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E5 - Unhealth Must Be Dead
metas.description: This week our comedians get inventive with eggs, compete for family heirlooms, and Angella Dravid awkwardly puts up an easel.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E6 - The Problem Is Me
metas.description: This week we see Madeleine Sami use the magical power of her mind, our teams get soup-y, and Paul Williams leaves.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E7 - An Intervention
metas.description: We find out how good Paul is at hiding, Guy Williams' frustration proves to be expensive, and we discover what the UK Taskmaster, Greg Davies, thinks of Jeremy.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E8 - Sweaty Socks and Depression
metas.description: This time, no one wants to take a call from Leigh Hart, and all the comedians struggle to send just one text.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E9 - Astro Blasters
metas.description: Guy Williams gets tricked and isn't happy about it, Paul Williams goes to an amusement park, and we debate what constitutes a sausage.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S1E10 - My Uncle John
metas.description: Season Finale: We find out who gets to take home Jeremy's big gold head!

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E1 - Flight Of Fantasy
metas.description: Taskmaster Jeremy Wells returns with sidekick Paul Williams as he sets bizarre tasks for comedians Urzila Carlson, Laura Daniel, Matt Heath, Guy Montgomery and David Correos.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E2 - Heat Stroke
metas.description: Urzila Carlson smashes a bottle of sunscreen, Guy Montgomery attempts to make a brussel sprout float in the sky, and we find out who can best change a room in complete darkness.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E3 - At Your Service
metas.description: A brand-new version of hopscotch is invented, a building task reveals this season's teams, and Matt Heath sneaks into Jeremy's bedroom.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E4 - Unbung
metas.description: Paul Williams has a problem with Swiss balls, our comedians get festive with a brand new song, David Correos defends the power of the red-eyed tree frog, and we see who can best trick Jeremy.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E5 - Feel My Bean
metas.description: Laura Daniel does her best to spill the beans, our comedians tell us where they’re from and why they’re happy about it, and we have Taskmaster New Zealand’s first-ever silent task.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E6 - Eat Your Asses
metas.description: The comedians debate what makes two things different, David Correos showcases his rapping skills, and we get a first-hand look at what a presidential Zoom call would be like.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E7 - Completing the Set
metas.description: The contestants bring in their best bargains and must construct the least appropriate wedding cake possible within 45 minutes.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E8 - Judgement Day
metas.description: Our contestants are inducing all kinds of nostalgia, while also attempting to travel through time. We learn who's best at stacking onions, and sabotage is afoot in our team task.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E9 - Bing Bang Schlong
metas.description: In our penultimate episode, our teams attempt to pull off the ultimate heist from right under Paul's nose. We're treated to romance, fashion, and orienteering, all to be judged by the Taskmaster.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S2E10 - A Good Time, Not a Fast Time
metas.description: We put the camera in our contestants' hands, as well as learn something through the medium of puppets. One contestant is pushed to the brink, and we crown our season 2 winner!

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E1 - F**k Golf
metas.description: Taskmaster NZ is back with Chris Parker, Josh Thomson, Justine Smith, Kura Forrester and Paul Ego joining Jeremy Wells and his loyal assistant Paul Williams for another season of tasks.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E2 - Sauce Tits
metas.description: Our second episode reveals this season's teams with a task involving a large ball and a cow. We see our comedians delight all five senses, and Paul Ego makes a dramatic exit from the shed.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E3 - Mexican Lasagna
metas.description: This episode sees Jeremy Wells getting scared, some questionable flags being created, and Chris Parker hanging out the washing.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E4 - Herbs & Spices
metas.description: Tonight finally settles the debate of who is the smartest comedian, Justine Smith searches for a duck, and our teams go for a drive.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E5 - The Prime Minister Thanks You
metas.description: It's the halfway point of the season, and our comedians all set out to create history. Water gets thrown, terrible investments are shown, and Josh Thomson tries not to touch a cow.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E6 - Sweet Navel Orange
metas.description: Paul Williams jumps behind the camera for episode six. Kura Forrester becomes a superhero and the comedians' superstitions are put to the test.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E7 - Butt Heavy
metas.description: Tonight's episode shows who's the most generous, who's the most enchanting, and who's the most observant. Plus, a star of season 2 returns - see if you can spot him.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E8 - Best Friends
metas.description: The caravan is covered in tasks, we see five things the Taskmaster has never seen, and Chris Parker makes a new best friend.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E9 - Well Alright!
metas.description: It's our penultimate episode and the scores could not be closer. Tonight, brand new breakfast staples are made, everyone becomes one with nature, and Paul Williams gets fooled.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S3E10 - Wet Ass Cutlery
metas.description: It's neck and neck between two comedians competing for the Taskmaster's golden head. Who can trick-or-treat their way to the trophy?

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E1 - A Love Bomb
metas.description: Taskmaster NZ is back for its fourth season with Dai Henwood, Melanie Bracewell, Bubbah, Karen O’Leary and Ray O’Leary all competing for a golden statue of Jeremy Wells’ head.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E2 - I'm a Therapist, Not a Greengrocer
metas.description: Our second episode features the first team task of the season that has Dai Henwood watching a toaster intently, a bowl of glitter breaks Bubbah, and the contestants get a chance to be Paul Williams.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E3 - Everyone Is Just a Teal Dress
metas.description: Ray O’Leary secedes from New Zealand in our third episode creating his very own “Ray-public”, while Melanie Bracwell directs and stars in the next great horror film about an evil gorilla bookend.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E4 - More Licky Licky
metas.description: Karen O’Leary makes a bet that relies on Paul Williams having a small mouth, while our teams attempt to teach Jeremy Wells about important historical events that they know nothing about.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E5 - Your Hand Can Do A Better Job
metas.description: We’re halfway through season four and we’re celebrating with five weddings. Our comedians attempt to do their best impressions of one another, and we learn Jeremy’s opinions on some hot topics.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E6 - There Had To Be Blood
metas.description: The comedians show off their most braggable items, Ray and Mel establish a new form of communication and last episode’s marriages all come to an unhappy end.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E7 - A Pretty Skux Cartwheel
metas.description: Episode 7 is full of magic and wonder with our cast attempting dazzling illusions. It’s a battle of paddles as Karen tries to win a point against Paul, and we get to see Dai Henwood at his coolest.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E8 - Steroids And Cigarettes
metas.description: The combination of office chairs and basketball is introduced in the eighth episode. The comedians are asked to prove their winners, and create a podcast about something vaguely interesting.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E9 - Truffle Pig
metas.description: The penultimate episode of season 4 has Dai Henwood singing with himself, while Karen O’Leary launches herself from a slingshot and Bubbah attempts to complete as many tasks as possible.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S4E10 - Where is Scorpio?
metas.description: Season Finale: The series points couldn’t be closer! Tonight we will learn who will be crowned the season 4 champion and earn the right to take home a golden copy of Jeremy Wells' head.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E1 - A Long Denouement
metas.description: Taskmaster NZ is back for season 5 with Abby Howells, Ben Hurley, Hayley Sproull, Tofiga Fepulea'i and Tom Sainsbury all competing for a golden statue of Jeremy Wells’ head.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E2 - Slightly Sucked Pasta
metas.description: Our second episode features a team task with a secret twist, we learn about the best moment of Hayley Sproull’s life, and Ben Hurley has one of the greatest athletic moments in Taskmaster history.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E3 - The Lamp Left Me On Read
metas.description: Tom Sainsbury devises a new way of eating marshmallows involving binoculars, Hayley Sproull has a meltdown over a lamp, and we see five movie trailers about a trailer

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E4 - Having a Flare-Up
metas.description: Episode four sees Tofiga Fepulea'i do “his favourite task”, the teams attempt to do impressions and build towers, while Ben Hurley teaches Paul how to remember every New Zealand prime minister.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E5 - A Marvellous Tool
metas.description: It’s halfway through the season and we’re celebrating by catapulting eggs. The cast celebrate the new year and stick to their resolutions, while Ben lives life to the fullest with a frisbee.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E6 - The One Where Rachel Dies In Childbirth
metas.description: The cast are asked to get on the same wavelength as Paul when it comes to fashion, we get to see five brand new biopics and there’s some trickery afoot with a complicated pirates map and tape player

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E7 - Sierra Echo Xylophone
metas.description: Abby’s prize task leaves Jeremy Wells speechless, we see incredible things an incredible number of times, and Hayley attempts to finish a task months after it started

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E8 - A Genie Comes If You Rub It
metas.description: It’s episode eight and the competition is getting close. Tom Sainsbury shows off his film making skills with a silent film, and the teams put on two very different corporate retreats

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E9 - An Absolute Pedant
metas.description: The penultimate episode of season five sees an insight into Paul’s bedtime routine, we get to watch balls go in holes, artworks come to life, and the reason why Ben called Hayley mustard-hands.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S5E10 - Oh Baby It's Elegance
metas.description:
It’s down to the wire to find our series 5 winner. We see 5 new countries and tourism videos created, witness the greatest ever rap song about the food pyramid and see who takes home the head!

Season Finale

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E1 - It's Like Make a Wish
metas.description: Taskmaster NZ is back for a new season. This time, Alice Snedden, Bree Tomasel, Jack Ansett, Jackie van Beek and Pax Assadi are all vying for the coveted gold trophy with a trip to space!

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E2 - Toxic Sexual Energy
metas.description: The teams meet for the first time this series with some power-dynamic plays right from the get-go, and Alice hits a lowpoint in the hunt for cake.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E3 - Get Out of My Box
metas.description: Jackie’s breakup takes a dramatic turn when she puts her trust in Paul, Bree uncovers a clue, and the comedians make an attempt to improve a moment from their teen years.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E4 - Who Knows Who I Am?
metas.description: The teams stage a prison break, Jack takes a different approach to a climactic event, and the comedians create the most unique noises for the Taskmaster.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E5 - Two Guys on a Mop
metas.description: It’s halfway through the season and we’re celebrating by sparking some life into the national anthem, and witnessing the most successful moment in Taskmaster history, according to Jack.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E6 - A Duck Archery Fanatic
metas.description: Jackie shows off her incredible aim while Pax tortures Paul in his task attempt, and the comedians have to remember a boring story.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E7 - Community Hip Hop
metas.description: The comedians make a mess playing dominos, Pax takes on a difficult game of golf, and Alice and Bree attempt to dazzle senior citizens with technology.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E8 - Hoisted on a Petard
metas.description: It's episode eight and the comedians show off their party tricks, play a numbers game and compete in a classic tower building task.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E9 - Comfortable in Your Own Skin
metas.description: The penultimate episode of season 6 sees Jack get it just right, a carefully crafted musical of five parts, and a quick call to some past contestants to help complete a task.

metas.name: Taskmaster NZ - S6E10 - Seen as Sneaky
metas.description: We’re at the final episode and anyone could still win! Comedians must use the right materials to protect the pig, bump Paul with a boat, and fly the best paper plane.
